title: Чтение
body:
Что такое Wheel of Heaven
Wheel of Heaven — это долгое прочтение старой истории — той, которую
древние тексты многих традиций рассказывают о происхождении человечества,
о том, кто его создал и почему. Прочтение использует
раэлианский первоисточник как основную интерпретативную
линзу: Элохим Книги Бытия — это не божество, а
команда — небольшая развитая человеческая цивилизация, способная
проектировать жизнь и действовать на межзвёздных расстояниях. Вокруг
этой линзы проект собирает библейский, месопотамский, ведический,
мезоамериканский и иной материал и упорядочивает его на единственных
достаточно длинных часах — на прецессии
равноденствий, медленном 26 000-летнем колебании
земной оси, превращающем ночное небо в календарь
эпох.
Это рабочая гипотеза, а не символ веры. Сайт построен так, чтобы вы
могли проверить работу.
Как это читать
Сайт читает сравнительный материал через раэлианскую рамку, а не как
нейтральный арбитр. Внутри этой рамки утверждения о каноне формулируются
прямо. Сравнительные утверждения через традиции остаются осторожными —
мормонизм, бахаи, каодаизм и прочие читаются в диалоге, а не сплющиваются
в «одну и ту же историю». Научные и исторические утверждения остаются
взвешенными. Критический материал представлен своим собственным голосом.
Каждая страница несёт небольшой значок, помечающий её главное
утверждение как прямое, выведенное или спекулятивное —
честность относительно того, какого рода высказывание вы читаете.
Цель — ясность, а не уверенность. Если данные меняются, меняется и
прочтение.

title: Timeline
body:
The Great Cosmic Timeline
Embark on an extraordinary journey through time itself—a 26,000-year odyssey that reveals the true history of Earth and humanity. This timeline chronicles the twelve precessional ages, each spanning approximately 2,160 years, during which our cosmic creators, the Elohim, guided the development of life on our planet.
From the initial discovery of Earth in the Age of Capricorn to the prophetic revelations awaiting us in the Age of Aquarius, witness how each age brought profound developments in the grand design of creation. This is not merely history—it is the cosmic blueprint of our existence, told through the lens of the Wheel of Heaven.
Prepare to see time not as a linear progression, but as a great wheel turning through the cosmos, each rotation bringing us closer to understanding our true origins and ultimate destiny.

title: Age of Leo
body:
I. The Age Itself
The sixth age is the age of the mirror.
The Age of Leo runs from –11,010 to –8,850, a span of 2,160 years, following immediately upon the Age of Virgo. It is the age in which the creation program, after more than ten thousand years of sustained work, produces the creation it has been building toward from the beginning: beings made in the image of their makers. The text of Genesis marks this as the sixth day, and the biblical account treats it with a ceremony absent from the earlier days — the famous phrase נַעֲשֶׂה אָדָם בְּצַלְמֵנוּ כִּדְמוּתֵנוּ (na'aseh adam betzalmenu kidmutenu), "let us make man in our image, after our likeness," spoken by the plural subject to itself before the act is undertaken. The ceremony reflects the weight of what is about to happen. Every previous creation has been directed at the planet, at the biosphere, at the conditions under which life would sustain itself. This creation is directed at the makers themselves. The scientists are about to produce beings like themselves, and in doing so they are about to transform what the project means — for the humans they create, for the civilization on the home world, and for their own understanding of what they have been doing all along.
The chapter's title — The Mirror — names what the age produces. Until this point, the creation program has been outward-facing: it has produced organisms unlike its makers, organisms calibrated to a planet rather than to the makers' own image, organisms whose function is to populate an environment rather than to reflect the population of their creators. With the human creation, the program turns inward. The scientists produce beings who can, when they look at their creators, recognize themselves. This is the mirror. It is what makes Leo categorically different from every age that has preceded it. The earlier ages produced an inhabited world. Leo produces a world that contains its own makers' reflection.
The age is mapped, in the Raëlian reading,

title: Age of Aries
body:
I. The Age Itself
The tenth age is the age of the ram and of those who speak for the Elohim.
The Age of Aries runs from –2,370 to –210, a span of 2,160 years, following immediately upon the Age of Taurus. It is, by a substantial margin, the longest sustained narrative arc in the Hebrew Bible: most of what the conventional tradition calls "biblical history" — the Exodus, the wandering, the conquest of Canaan, the period of the Judges, the united monarchy under Saul and David and Solomon, the divided kingdoms of Israel and Judah, the great prophetic tradition, the Babylonian exile, and the Second Temple period — unfolds within its boundaries. It is also the age during which, elsewhere in the world, the civilizations that had consolidated during Taurus reach their classical expressions: the Egyptian New Kingdom, the Mesopotamian empires from the Old Babylonian period through Assyria, the Persian imperial system, the flowering of Chinese dynastic civilization under the Zhou, the Indian Vedic period and the emergence of the Upanishads, the Olmec and early Maya in Mesoamerica, the Greek classical period at its very end. Aries is the age in which the post-flood civilizational project enters its mature phase across every lineage. It is also the age in which the political relationship between the Eden lineage and the Elohim alliance acquires the form that will shape the entire subsequent religious history of the West — and the age in which the Elohim themselves make a discovery that transforms how they will relate to all of their creations from that moment forward.
The age is named for its constellation: Aries, the Ram. From approximately –2,000 to roughly the beginning of the common era, observers around the post-flood world looking eastward at the sunrise on the spring equinox would have seen the sun emerge against the stars of the Ram rather than those of the Bull. The shift from Taurus to Aries was, for the ancient astronomers who tracked such things, a visible and datab

title: In the Beginning
body:
I. The Civilization Before
The civilization that would eventually send a small expedition to Earth was, before it sent the expedition, a civilization much like our own at the level of its own self-understanding. The source's specific phrase is direct: "A very long time ago on our distant planet, we had reached a level of technical and scientific knowledge, comparable to that which you will soon reach." The point of the comparison is not flattery. It is structural. The civilization that became what we call the Elohim was, before it became that, a civilization that resembled ours closely enough that the analogies the source draws between their situation and ours can be drawn with some confidence.
The home planet's geography, ecology, and physical character cannot be reconstructed in detail from the available material. The source identifies it as a single world supporting a single human civilization at the relevant period, with the technological capacities required for what the corpus has been calling alliance-level work — interplanetary travel within the home stellar system, eventual interstellar travel, biotechnology approaching the threshold of de novo synthesis, computational and information infrastructure adequate to the management of a planetary-scale civilization. What the source establishes is the broad civilizational level: a planet that had achieved the technological maturity required for the work that followed, with the social and political institutions that maturity required.
The institutional infrastructure is somewhat clearer in the surviving record. The source describes a structure organized around a Council of Eternals, with deliberative procedures for major decisions, with specific institutional roles distributed among its members, and with the bureaucratic-administrative apparatus that any planetary-scale operation requires. The Council was not merely a scientific body; it was the political authority of the civilization, with executive responsibility

title: Age of Aquarius
body:
I. The Age Itself
The twelfth age is the age in which everything the previous eleven ages prepared for becomes visible.
The Age of Aquarius runs from 1950 forward across the next 2,160 years. Its opening falls within living memory: readers of this chapter are, in almost all cases, inhabitants of the age it describes. The chapter is therefore different in kind from the eleven that preceded it. Those chapters worked from archaeological and textual evidence toward interpretive reconstructions of events long past; this chapter works from the current moment outward, describing the events the corpus has been accumulating toward since its first page, the events that have already unfolded across the past eighty years, and the trajectory those events appear to be taking as the Aquarian age enters its first operational phase. The reader is not looking back at this age from a secure historical distance. The reader is inside it, writing inside it, making the specific decisions across the coming years that will contribute to whether the age develops toward its positive or its negative possible outcome.
The age is named for its constellation: Aquarius, the Water-Bearer. The figure traditionally depicted in the constellation is a man pouring water from a vessel — in most iconographic traditions, a young or middle-aged figure tipping a large urn from which a stream of water flows downward toward the southern stars. The symbolism has been read in many ways across the history of astrology. The corpus reads it at its most literal level: the Aquarian age is the age in which what has been contained is poured out. The knowledge the alliance has been accumulating across the earlier ages, the scientific understanding humanity has been developing across the Piscean age's long arc of independent development, the religious traditions that have preserved across centuries the core content of the earlier revelations — all of this, long contained within specialized vessels of transmission accessi

title: Age of Capricorn
body:
I. The Age Itself
The first age is the age in which almost nothing yet exists.
This is the hardest of the twelve ages to write about, for the simple reason that its content is preparation rather than event. No continents have yet been raised. No plants have yet been planted. No animals have yet been designed, no humans have yet been imagined, no cities have yet been founded, no languages have yet been taught, no prophets have yet been commissioned. The long catalogue of things the later ages will contain has not, at the beginning of the Age of Capricorn, begun to be filled. What the age contains instead is a decision, a journey, an arrival, and a survey — the quiet preliminary work that a long project requires before any of it is visible from outside. The age is a threshold, and thresholds, by their nature, consist largely of what is about to happen rather than of what is already happening.
The age runs, by the reckoning this corpus uses, from –21,810 to –19,650, a span of 2,160 years. The number is not arbitrary. It is the interval required for the point of the vernal equinox — the place in the sky where the sun rises on the first day of spring — to travel backwards through one constellation of the zodiac as seen from Earth. This motion, called the precession of the equinoxes, is produced by a slow wobble in the Earth's axis. The full precessional cycle takes approximately 25,920 years; divided by the twelve constellations of the zodiac, it yields the figure of 2,160 years per age. This is the unit of time in which this chronicle is told. It is neither a human unit nor an astronomical accident. It is the unit at which celestial motion and terrestrial observation become legible to each other, and it is the unit in which the oldest cosmological traditions agree, more often than they disagree, that sacred history is to be measured.
Twelve ages, each of roughly two millennia, make one Great Year. The Great Year is the frame within which everything in this corpus takes

title: Age of Scorpio
body:
I. The Age Itself
The first life appears in this age.
The Age of Scorpio runs from –17,490 to –15,330, a span of 2,160 years, following immediately upon the Age of Sagittarius. It is the age in which the long preparation of the previous two ages — the survey, the atmospheric separation, the raising of the continents — yields its first biological result. A planet that has been, until this point, a vast unoccupied laboratory begins to be populated. But the population is not announced with a flourish. It begins with plants. It begins, more precisely, with simple photosynthetic organisms whose visible consequences take centuries to become significant and whose ecological consequences take longer still. The age is the age of the greening of the Earth. It is also, though the phrase is too dramatic for what actually happens, the age of the first life. And because it is the first, it sets the pattern for every subsequent biological creation in the sequence.
The age is mapped, in the Raëlian reading, to the eleventh and twelfth verses of Genesis 1, and to the thirteenth verse by extension. The Hebrew text of Genesis 1:11 reads:
וַיֹּאמֶר אֱלֹהִים תַּדְשֵׁא הָאָרֶץ דֶּשֶׁא עֵשֶׂב מַזְרִיעַ זֶרַע עֵץ פְּרִי עֹשֶׂה פְּרִי לְמִינוֹ אֲשֶׁר זַרְעוֹ־בוֹ עַל־הָאָרֶץ וַיְהִי־כֵן
Vayomer Elohim tadshe ha-aretz deshe, esev mazria zera, etz pri oseh pri le-mino asher zaro vo al ha-aretz, vayehi khen
"And Elohim said: let the earth sprout forth tender vegetation, herb yielding seed, and fruit tree yielding fruit after its kind, whose seed is in itself, upon the earth; and it was so."
The twelfth verse elaborates:
וַתּוֹצֵא הָאָרֶץ דֶּשֶׁא עֵשֶׂב מַזְרִיעַ זֶרַע לְמִינֵהוּ וְעֵץ עֹשֶׂה פְּרִי אֲשֶׁר זַרְעוֹ־בוֹ לְמִינֵהוּ וַיַּרְא אֱלֹהִים כִּי־טוֹב
Va-totzei ha-aretz deshe, esev mazria zera le-minehu, ve-etz oseh pri asher zaro vo le-minehu, vayar Elohim ki tov
"And the earth brought forth tender vegetation, herb yielding seed after its kind, and tree yielding fruit whose seed was in its

title: Age of Gemini
body:
I. The Age Itself
The eighth age is the age of the break.
The Age of Gemini runs from –6,690 to –4,530, a span of 2,160 years, following immediately upon the Age of Cancer. It is the age in which the accumulated tensions of the pre-flood civilization resolve into the catastrophe the Hebrew Bible calls the flood — an event so severe that it destroys the dominant human civilization of its time, kills almost every large organism on the supercontinent, shatters the single landmass into the drifting continents we now know, and leaves the survivors to rebuild the human species from a small preserved population and a store of genetic material carried, during the event, in orbit above the planet. Gemini is the dividing line between two worlds: the pre-flood world the Cancer chapter described, in which humanity had reached a civilizational level perhaps equal to or exceeding our own, and the post-flood world, in which the human population starts over on a reshaped planet, with most of its inheritance lost.
The name of the age in the zodiac is appropriate in ways the source does not fully unpack. Gemini is the sign of the twins — two linked figures, one above and one below, united in origin and divided in fate. The age itself has this doubled character. There are two Earths in this age: the Earth that ends at the flood, and the Earth that begins after it. There are two humanities: the one destroyed, and the one preserved through Noah's vessel. There are two continental configurations: the single landmass that existed for the first centuries of the age, and the fragmenting continents that exist for the rest of it. The Hebrew Bible itself preserves this doubling in the number eight — the number of humans preserved on the ark (Noah, his wife, their three sons, and their sons' wives) — which represents, in the structure of the creation week, the day after the seventh, the day that begins a new sequence. Gemini is that day. The first seven days were the creation. The eighth day is

title: Age of Virgo
body:
I. The Age Itself
The fifth age is the age in which the world begins to move.
The Age of Virgo runs from –13,170 to –11,010, a span of 2,160 years, following immediately upon the Age of Libra. It is the age in which animal life appears on this planet for the first time. Until this point, every organism produced by the creation program has been stationary, or moving only at scales too small to count as movement at the level of the visible world. The plants of Scorpio grow but do not move. The decomposers of Libra — the fungi, the bacteria, the nematodes, the earthworms, the springtails, the early arthropods — live at scales so small that their movement is not, to the eye of an observer standing on the continent, a visible feature of the world. With Virgo, this changes. The first creatures large enough to be seen from a distance begin to appear. They swim in the ocean. They fly through the air. And in the latter portion of the age, they walk, run, and thunder across the dry surface of the supercontinent in forms whose scale and strangeness would, by themselves, be enough to make this one of the most distinctive ages in the sequence. Virgo is the age of the first animals. It is also the age in which the project, for reasons that will require their own section, deliberately produces creatures whose creation had been forbidden on the home world.
The chapter's title — The Garden of Forms — names what the age produces. By its end, the supercontinent and its single ocean contain a diversity of organismic forms that the previous ages, despite their substantial biological output, had not yet approached. The plants and decomposers of Scorpio and Libra are present in great variety, but their variety is internal to the broad categories of photosynthesizer and detritivore. The animals of Virgo are something different. They are sensing, moving, behaving organisms, designed in shapes that range from the microscopic plankton at the base of the marine food web to the enormous reptili

title: The Wheel Keeps Turning
body:
I. Infinity
The cosmological frame within which the corpus's twelve-age narrative operates is the frame of infinity. The frame deserves explicit treatment here, at the outro's opening, because everything else the corpus has constructed sits within it.
The source's treatment of infinity is, in technical terms, a fractal cosmology. The cosmos has the property that its structure repeats at every scale. Each scale of organization contains within it the next scale down; each scale is contained within the next scale up; the pattern continues indefinitely in both directions without finding any bottom or any top. Our solar system is a planetary scale within a galactic scale within an intergalactic scale; the Earth is also itself, viewed from sufficient zoom, an enormous structure containing within it continental scales, ecosystem scales, organismic scales, cellular scales, molecular scales, atomic scales, subatomic scales, and presumably scales below the smallest currently observable. The pattern continues at the smallest scales: each subatomic particle, on the source's claim, is itself a structure of vast complexity at its own native scale, containing planetary systems and beings within itself, who are in turn vast structures containing further worlds within themselves, and so on indefinitely.
The source's specific image is striking. "The Earth is but a particle of the atom of the atoms of the hand of a gigantic being, who contemplates a starlit sky which composes the hand, the stomach or the foot of a being even more gigantic, who finds himself under a sky, etc., etc., ad infinitum." The universe we observe — the galaxies that fill the sky we see at night, the cosmic background radiation that bounds our observable universe at its furthest reach — is, on this picture, a fragment of a single atom in the body of a much vaster being, whose own world we cannot perceive. That vaster being, in turn, is one figure standing in a still vaster world that contains uncounted such bein

title: Age of Libra
body:
I. The Age Itself
The fourth age is the age in which the sky becomes useful.
The Age of Libra runs from –15,330 to –13,170, a span of 2,160 years, following immediately upon the Age of Scorpio. It is the age to which the Genesis account assigns what is, on the conventional reading, one of the more puzzling operations in the creation sequence: the making of the sun, the moon, and the stars. The puzzle is straightforward to state. Light has already appeared on Day 1, when Elohim saw the light that it was good. Plants have already been created on Day 3, and photosynthetic plants require solar radiation to exist. If the sun is not made until Day 4, how did the plants of Day 3 photosynthesize? The question has troubled commentators for thousands of years, and the conventional answers — that Day 1's light is some primordial, non-solar luminescence; that Day 4's "making" is not a genuine creation but a clarification of function already implicit; that the text is not meant to be read sequentially in this respect — all require a certain amount of interpretive gymnastics.
The Raëlian reading dissolves the puzzle. The sun and the stars were not created on Day 4. They had been there, doing what they do, for billions of years before the Elohim arrived. The moon is a more complicated case, to which this chapter will return. What happens on Day 4 is not a cosmological creation but a functional integration: the heavenly bodies become, in the Elohim's project, what the text calls מְאֹרוֹת (me'orot) — lights, luminaries — and specifically the lights "for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years." The sun that had been measured during the Age of Capricorn, whose radiation had been declared "good" at the opening of the creation account, now becomes a calendrical instrument. The constellations, which had been rotating overhead since before the Elohim arrived, are named, mapped, and incorporated into the working vocabulary of the project. Day 4 is the day the scientists formalize

title: Preamble
body:
I. A Shape That Recurs
A reader who has stayed with this corpus through its full sweep will have noticed something the corpus has not, until this opening, named directly. The story the corpus tells across its twelve chapters is not unique. The story is, in its broad structural features, a story that has been told before — in fragments, under many names, by civilizations separated from each other by oceans and by millennia and by every barrier to direct cultural transmission that the geography of human history has erected. The story has a shape, and the shape is remarkably stable across the variations that the various tellings preserve. A prior intelligence, possessed of capacities that resemble what we now call science, makes decisions in a location that the relevant tradition describes as above or beyond the world we live on. The decisions are contested in something resembling a council or a vote. The life we now take for the natural order of this planet is the outcome of those decisions. And the memory of the whole sequence is preserved in texts whose authors insist, sometimes in exasperated terms, that they are recording what actually happened, not what might be poetically imagined.
This corpus is not the first attempt to take that recurring shape seriously. It is a recent attempt, conducted at a moment when the cultural and technological conditions for the kind of integration the work requires have finally matured, but the shape itself has been visible to attentive readers across many generations. What the corpus offers is a specific framework for reading the traditions that preserve the shape — a framework that takes the Raëlian source material, published by Claude Vorilhon under the name Rael across the years following his contact in 1973, as its primary interpretive lens, and that extends that lens across the broader body of evidence the religious and historical traditions provide. Whether the framework is correct in its specific claims is a question the corp

title: Age of Taurus
body:
I. The Age Itself
The ninth age is the age in which history begins to be written.
The Age of Taurus runs from –4,530 to –2,370, a span of 2,160 years, following immediately upon the Age of Gemini. It is the first age of the corpus whose major events fall within the period that conventional archaeology can document directly. The Sumerian cuneiform tablets, the Egyptian Old Kingdom monuments, the Indus Valley urban centers, the megalithic complexes of Atlantic Europe, the Norte Chico settlements of the Andean coast, the early walled cities of the Levant — all of these belong to the Taurus period. The earlier ages of the corpus required the reader to take on faith that human civilization existed in advanced form before the flood, and to read the mythological record as preserved memory of a world the conventional archaeology cannot recover. From Taurus onward, the situation reverses. The conventional archaeology becomes our partner. The early civilizations whose ruins, tablets, monuments, and burial sites our discipline has been unearthing for two centuries are the post-flood civilizations of the corpus's Taurus age, in their early consolidation. What the Wheel of Heaven framework adds is not a parallel narrative to the archaeological record but a deeper context for it — a political and historical structure within which the visible facts of the early Bronze Age make a different kind of sense.
The age takes its name from the constellation Taurus, the bull, in which the vernal equinox rose throughout the period. This astronomical fact had cultural consequences across every region where the heavens were watched: the bull became, during these millennia, perhaps the most widely distributed religious symbol in the post-flood world. From the Apis cult in Egypt to the Bull of Heaven in Mesopotamia to the bull-leaping ceremonies of Minoan Crete to the bull seals of the Indus Valley to the bull horns embedded in the megalithic monuments of Atlantic Europe, the precessional age an

title: Age of Cancer
body:
I. The Age Itself
The seventh age is the age of consequences.
The Age of Cancer runs from –8,850 to –6,690, a span of 2,160 years following immediately upon the Age of Leo. It is the age in which the creation program, completed at the end of Leo, becomes the creation history — the age in which the beings who were made in the preceding age begin to do the things that beings capable of acting do. They discover their situation. They disobey their makers. They are separated from the prepared environment in which they were first placed. They go out into the broader world they had, until this point, seen only from within the garden. They begin to reproduce. Their children are born outside the laboratories. Some of the first generation live extraordinarily long lives. The exiled creators take human women as wives and produce hybrid offspring. The seven civilizations across the supercontinent grow, develop, trade, fight, and accumulate the kind of power that begins to alarm the home world watching from its distant planet. By the end of the age, the situation on Earth has progressed to a point where the home world government concludes that intervention is unavoidable. The Flood, which the next chapter will treat, becomes inevitable during the centuries this chapter describes.
The age is mapped, in the Raëlian reading, to the transition between the Genesis 1 creation account and the Genesis 2 Eden narrative, continuing through Genesis 3 (the expulsion), Genesis 4 (Cain and Abel), Genesis 5 (the long lifespans), and the opening verses of Genesis 6 (the sons of Elohim and the daughters of men). The biblical text does not partition these events into discrete ages. The Raëlian reading adopted by this corpus places all of them within Cancer, because they constitute a single extended narrative arc — the arc that begins with the humans in the garden at the end of Leo and ends with the political conditions that will, in the subsequent age, produce the Flood.
The chapter's title — The

title: Age of Sagittarius
body:
I. The Age Itself
The first work begins where the survey ends.
The Age of Sagittarius runs from –19,650 to –17,490, a span of 2,160 years, following immediately upon the Age of Capricorn. It is the age in which the scientists first act on the world they have been studying — the age in which, after two millennia of measurement and analysis, the decision to begin the physical alteration of the planet is finally taken, and the first interventions are conducted. The work that begins here is atmospheric and oceanographic; it will prepare the ground, in the most literal sense, for everything that follows. Continents will rise during this age. The sky will be separated from the sea. The opaque, mist-wrapped world of Capricorn will become, slowly and by degrees, a world in which the sun can be seen from the surface and in which surface operations are possible at all. None of the biology will yet have begun. But the stage on which the biology will take place will, by the end of this age, exist.
The conventional mapping of this age to the sixth and seventh verses of Genesis — the creation of the firmament, the separation of the waters above from the waters below — captures a part of what happens here but not the whole. If the age is taken to correspond strictly to the second יוֹם (yom) of the Genesis account, then only the atmospheric work belongs to it, and the continent-raising that follows in Genesis 1:9–10 must be placed elsewhere. The corpus has taken a different view, placing the continent-raising within Sagittarius as well, on the grounds that the work is continuous with the atmospheric separation and cannot be cleanly partitioned across an age boundary. The Genesis text, on this reading, compresses into a single verse a geological operation that in reality spanned the final centuries of Sagittarius and the opening centuries of Scorpio. This is a reasonable reading, and it is the one this chapter will adopt, while being explicit about the seam where the biblical day-co

title: Age of Pisces
body:
I. The Age Itself
The eleventh age is the age of the fish, the age of the virgin, and the age during which the alliance's message at last began to reach the wider world the Hebrews had failed to reach.
The Age of Pisces runs from –210 to 1,950, a span of 2,160 years, following immediately upon the Age of Aries. It is the first age of the corpus whose entire span falls within what the conventional historical record can document in detail, and its events constitute the core of what Western civilization has called "history" in the strong sense — the Roman Empire at its height and its fall, the rise and spread of Christianity, the emergence of Islam, the medieval synthesis of religion and philosophy, the Renaissance and the scientific revolution, the exploration and colonization of the continents, the industrial transformation, the two world wars, and the slow emergence of a global civilization in the twentieth century. Everything a Western-educated person thinks of when they think of "the past two thousand years" belongs to the Age of Pisces. What the Wheel of Heaven framework offers for this period is not a parallel history but a deeper context — the political and religious structure within which these visible events make a different kind of sense, and within which the specific alliance interventions that shaped them become legible.
The age is named for its constellation: Pisces, the Fishes. From approximately the last centuries before the common era until approximately the middle of the twentieth century, observers around the post-flood world looking eastward at the sunrise on the spring equinox would have seen the sun emerge against the stars of the Fishes rather than those of the Ram. The shift from Aries to Pisces was, like the previous precessional transitions the corpus has traced, a real astronomical event whose occurrence could be observed and dated by the ancient sky-watchers who tracked such things. The cultural signature of the new age followed the astronom

title: Lire
body:
Ce qu'est Wheel of Heaven
Wheel of Heaven est une longue lecture d'une vieille histoire — celle que
les textes anciens de nombreuses traditions racontent sur l'origine de
l'humanité, qui l'a créée et pourquoi. La lecture prend le matériel
source raëlien comme sa lentille interprétative
principale : les Elohim de la Genèse n'étaient pas
une divinité mais une équipe — une petite civilisation humaine
avancée, capable de concevoir la vie et d'opérer à travers des distances
interstellaires. Autour de cette lentille, le projet rassemble du
matériel biblique, mésopotamien, védique, mésoaméricain et autre, et
l'organise sur la seule horloge suffisamment longue pour le contenir — la
précession des équinoxes, l'oscillation lente de
26 000 ans de l'axe terrestre qui transforme le ciel nocturne en
calendrier des âges.
Ceci est une hypothèse de travail, pas un credo. Le site est construit
pour que vous puissiez vérifier le travail.
Comment lire ceci
Le site lit le matériel comparatif à travers le cadre raëlien, et non
comme arbitre neutre. À l'intérieur de ce cadre, les affirmations sur le
canon sont énoncées directement. Les affirmations comparatives entre
traditions restent nuancées — le mormonisme, le Bahá'í, le caodaïsme et
les autres sont lus en dialogue, et non aplanis en « la même histoire ».
Les affirmations scientifiques et historiques restent mesurées. Le
matériel critique est présenté avec sa propre voix.
Chaque page porte un petit badge étiquetant son affirmation principale
comme directe, inférée ou spéculative — honnêteté quant au
type d'énoncé que vous lisez.
Le but est la clarté, pas la certitude. Si les preuves changent, la
lecture change.

title: 媒體資料包
body:
面向記者、編輯和出版人
  媒體資料包
  撰寫關於 Wheel of Heaven 所需的一切。品牌資源、三種長度的樣板文案、概覽、調色板和字體、媒體聯絡 — 一切均採用 CC0-1.0 授權。
  
    下載品牌包 (.zip, 1.9 MB)
    透過郵件聯絡媒體
  


關於 Wheel of Heaven
三種長度的樣板文案,可直接貼上。複製只取得文字,不包含周圍的標記。

  
    一句話 約 35 詞
    複製
  
  Wheel of Heaven 是一項開放的多語言閱讀專案,透過一個工作假設閱讀古代創造傳統:被稱為埃洛希姆的存在是一個小型先進人類文明,他們設計了地球上的生命。


  
    短段落 約 90 詞
    複製
  
  Wheel of Heaven 將宗教文本作為一個真實事件的部分扭曲記錄來閱讀——這個事件是一個被稱為埃洛希姆的先進人類文明對地球生命的工程設計——並跨越大年的十二個歲差時代追蹤該事件。這一閱讀被視為有待檢驗的假設,而非教義。每個頁面都帶有一個小徽章,將其主要論斷分類為直接、推斷或推測。本專案免費、源頭清晰,並在證據發生變化時保持開放修訂。


  
    擴展描述 約 180 詞
    
  
  Wheel of Heaven 是一項開放的多語言閱讀專案,透過一個工作假設閱讀古代世界的創造傳統——拉爾派、聖經、美索不達米亞等等。這個假設是:被稱為埃洛希姆的存在是一個小型的先進人類文明,他們來到這裡,設計了地球上的生命,並在宗教文本中留下了記錄。
  本閱讀跨越歲差週期的十二個時代,從兩萬兩千年前專案開始到當前的揭示時代,以及下一個大年所開啟的漫長未來。
  本網站免費、源頭清晰、並以可被檢驗為目標構建。每個頁面都帶有認識論徽章——直接、推斷或推測——以便讀者了解所面對的是哪一類論斷。語料庫以九種語言、依 CC0-1.0 授權發布,原始碼在 github.com/wheelofheaven 開放。證據變化時,閱讀也隨之變化。



概覽

  全名Wheel of Heaven
  簡稱WoH(正文首次提及後)
  發音wheel · uhv · hev·uhn(英文發音)
  類別比較宗教 · 古代太空人研究 · 開放經典
  成立2023 年(公開發布) — 基礎工作跨越約十年
  狀態活躍 · 已發布約 1,500 篇 · 每週新增
  語言9 種 — 英語、德語、法語、西班牙語、俄語、日語、簡體中文、繁體中文、韓語
  授權內容 CC0-1.0 · 程式碼 MIT
  網站wheelofheaven.world
  原始碼github.com/wheelofheaven
  媒體聯絡press@wheelofheaven.world



品牌名稱 — 如何書寫

title: 討論
body:
項目的公開論壇是 GitHub Discussions。這裡是提問、提出異議、提出替代解讀、推薦資料、協調翻譯工作，或以其他方式在公開場域與語料庫交流的合適場所。
作者會閱讀並回覆。回覆不一定即時——項目在一份要求頗高的本職工作之餘進行——但每一條實質性的話題都會得到真正的回覆。
它是做什麼用的
提問
FAQ 尚未涵蓋的一切，或 FAQ 的回答讓你產生進一步追問之處。FAQ 本身是從 Discussions 的討論中生長出來的：一個反覆出現的好問題，最終可能在 FAQ 中得到回答。
異議與替代性解讀
項目的立場是：框架是一個有待檢驗的工作假設，而非有待捍衛的教義。不同意見是受歡迎的。如果你對原始材料的閱讀不同於語料庫；如果你認為某處學界共識被誤述；或者你覺得某一處具體的解讀上的處理並不令人信服——Discussions 是把這些說出來的合適場所。
作者寧願聽到一份誠實的反對，也不要一份虛偽的贊同。實質性的挑戰是改進語料庫的方式之一。
資料建議
如果你知道某條項目應當處理的資料——一份一手文本、一項學術研究、一份批評性解讀，或來自語料庫尚未充分對待之傳統的一處平行——Discussions 是提示它的地方。請附上引文、一段說明該來源為何重要的文字，最好還要指出語料庫中它可能相關的具體頁面或段落。
翻譯協調
本站發布九種語言，歡迎更多翻譯加入。翻譯工作通過 Discussions 協調：範圍、術語表、風格問題、審校。
自我介紹
如果你是項目的新讀者並希望打個招呼，Discussions 設有「介紹」分類。並不要求參與者必須自我介紹；項目也樂於擁有從不發言的讀者。
它不是做什麼用的

對特定頁面的事實性更正——這類應放入問題追蹤器，而非 Discussions。
代碼或基礎設施工作——相應倉庫的 Pull Request 與 Issue，而非 Discussions。
給作者的私信——Discussions 在設計上是公開的。如果某事確實需要私密處理，項目的行為準則說明了合適的渠道。

關於語域
Discussions 是一個公共空間，遵循項目的行為準則。實質性的不同意見受歡迎；人身攻擊、騷擾，以及有針對性的敵意則不受歡迎。如果你還未閱讀過行為準則，請在發帖前閱讀。
項目的學術語域在 Discussions 中同樣適用，只是比語料庫本身更寬鬆。作者在那裡以與寫語料庫時相同的聲音寫作——直接、對來源敏感、對論斷保持謹慎——這正是能獲得最有用回應的語域。

title: 隱私政策
body:
Wheel of Heaven 是一個靜態站點。沒有後端、沒有資料庫、沒有賬號系統、本域名上沒有託管任何評論區，也沒有任何分析工具。本專案的隱私立場不是「管理機制」，而是「機制本就不存在」——隱私政策幾乎無話可說，這正是本頁的要義。
本專案不收集的資訊
本站不收集：

姓名、電郵地址、電話號碼或任何其他個人識別資訊
使用者賬號、登入憑據或會話資料
表單提交（本域名上不存在任何表單）
本域名上的評論、發文或使用者生成內容
任何分析或追蹤資料——沒有 Google Analytics、沒有 Plausible、沒有 Matomo、沒有自建遙測
用於廣告、營銷或跨站追蹤的 Cookie
本專案側的 IP 地址或位置資訊

這並不是專案努力遵守的承諾，而是站點構造本身決定的屬性：根本不存在能做這些事的服務端程式碼。
本專案確實儲存的內容
專案在你的瀏覽器本地儲存中儲存少量極小的偏好——主題、語言、對免責說明的確認。它們從未離開你的裝置。完整清單見Cookie 政策。
第三方可能看到的內容
你訪問本站時，少數不可避免的第三方可能看到普通的 HTTP 層資訊：

託管服務商 出於服務運維需要會保留標準伺服器日誌（IP、User-Agent、請求路徑）。專案並不為分析或畫像目的而查閱這些日誌。
外部連結 ——當你點選離開本站訪問 GitHub、維基百科或任何其他連結站點時，該站點收集什麼由它自己的政策決定。專案並不控制被連結站點，也不與之共享資料。
外部資源 ——所使用的字型均為本地託管；專案不從可能對你進行追蹤的第三方 CDN 載入字型、指令碼或樣式表。

如果某一天這一情況發生變化——例如專案引入選擇性加入的分析——本頁會被更新，變更將在釋出說明中標記。
你的權利
依據歐盟 GDPR、瑞士 FADP、英國 UK GDPR、加州 CCPA 與其他隱私體制，你擁有訪問、更正或刪除某服務儲存的關於你的個人資料的權利。由於本專案並未儲存任何關於你的個人資料，因此也沒有任何可供訪問、更正或刪除的東西。如果你認為本專案錯誤地保留了你的資料，請聯絡——最可能的解釋是某種誤會，專案希望直接解決它。
未成年人
本站向所有讀者開放，包括未成年人，但其內容面向對宗教—歷史素材感興趣的成年讀者。本專案不會有意識地從任何人收集資料，未成年人亦然。
本政策的變更
如果本專案將來改變了處理資料的方式——例如新增選擇性加入的分析、評論或任何後端功能——本頁會被更新，變更將在釋出說明中標記。語料庫的 CC0 許可同樣適用於本政策：你可以自由地複製、改寫並複用它。
聯絡方式
如對本政策有疑問，請在 GitHub Discussions 開主題，或在倉庫開 Issue。對不宜公開的、與隱私有關的具體事項，請通過本專案行為準則中所列的渠道與維護者聯絡。

title: Cookie 政策
body:
Wheel of Heaven 是一個靜態站點。沒有後端，沒有資料庫，沒有使用者賬戶系統。Cookie 僅用於必要的偏好設定。沒有任何追蹤，沒有畫像構建，也沒有第三方廣告。
什麼是 Cookie
Cookie 是瀏覽器在你訪問網站時儲存在裝置上的一小段文本檔案。某些 Cookie 對站點正常執行是必不可少的（例如：記住你啟用的是亮色還是暗色主題、你閱讀的是哪種語言）；另一些則被追蹤器用於構建你在網路上的活動畫像。本站只使用前者，不使用後者。
站點儲存什麼
本站使用瀏覽器的本地儲存（技術上是 localStorage，本政策按 Cookie 對待）來存放少量嚴格功能性的偏好：

主題 — 亮色或暗色模式，避免站點在你每次切換頁面時出現主題閃爍。
語言 — 你閱讀的是九種受支援的翻譯中的哪一種，免去在每頁重新選擇的麻煩。
免責說明確認 — 一個一位元的標誌，用於記錄你已經關閉了「這是一項工作假設」的橫幅，避免每次訪問都重複出現。

這些都不會離開你的裝置。它們都不與任何識別符號關聯。它們都不會發送給任何第三方。
站點不會做的事
本站不會跨頁面、跨會話、跨站點追蹤你的行為；不會構建關於你是誰、你讀什麼的畫像；不會設定廣告或營銷類 Cookie；不會執行任何第三方分析指令碼；不會向任何人出售或共享資料。
最接近「分析」的內容，是託管服務商在請求層級為正常運維所保留的日誌（IP 地址、User-Agent、請求路徑）。這些日誌歸屬於託管服務商，並不屬於本專案；在本站側，它們也並未與任何識別符號相聯結——因為本站沒有可與之聯結的識別符號。
第三方
本站不嵌入任何第三方追蹤指令碼。如果某個頁面連結到外部資源——例如 GitHub Discussions 或對 維基百科 的引用——該連結僅在你點選後才生效。訪問此類外部連結所發生的事情，遵循該站點自身的政策，而非本政策。
清除偏好
你可以隨時通過瀏覽器設定清除本站儲存的偏好（通常路徑：站點設定 → Cookie 與站點資料 → 清除 wheelofheaven.world 的資料）。站點將繼續工作；它只是會在下次訪問時忘記你的主題與語言選擇。
本政策的變更
如果專案將來修改了本站所儲存的內容——例如，在某個時點引入選擇性加入的分析——本頁會被更新，變更將在釋出說明中標記。語料庫的 CC0 許可同樣適用於本政策：你可以自由地複製、改寫並複用它。
聯絡方式
如有疑問，請在 GitHub Discussions 開主題，或在倉庫開 Issue。

title: 貢獻
body:
Wheel of Heaven 以 CC0 開源，歡迎貢獻者。項目以一位作者的第一人稱單數聲音進行，但圍繞它的工作——翻譯、編輯、基礎設施、公共討論——受益於眾多雙手。
貢獻者無需贊同項目的框架。批評性的參與是受歡迎的。
在開始之前
請閱讀行為準則。參與項目的公共空間——Discussions、Issue、Pull Request——以此為前提。
請瀏覽 FAQ，特別是關於工作假設、源頭家族、以及項目如何處理論斷類型的條目。它們提供的語境會讓大多數貢獻變得容易。
貢獻的方式
討論與提問
GitHub Discussions 是項目主要的公共論壇。誠實的問題、實質性的異議、替代性的解讀、新的資料來源，都在那裡受歡迎。討論線索有時會直接回饋到語料庫中——一個尖銳的問題，可能最終反映在某個 Wiki 條目或 FAQ 答覆中。
翻譯
本站以英文為源頭，發布九種語言。譯文由人與工具共同從英文原文派生，在可能時進行編輯審校。歡迎更多語言；已有譯文也總是可以改進。
如果你對翻譯感興趣，請打開一個 Discussion 話題或 Issue，描述語言與範圍。項目會提供源材料、項目專用術語表，以及風格指南。
內容更正與建議
如果站內某頁存在事實性錯誤、失效鏈接、錯誤引用某來源，或對某一學界立場表述失當，項目寧願知情。請在倉庫開啟 Issue，註明頁面 URL 與具體更正。
解讀上的分歧——你與語料庫對同一來源的不同解讀——應放入 Discussions，而非 Issue。項目歡迎此類分歧，但它與事實性更正屬於不同種類的貢獻。
代碼與基礎設施
本站是用 Zola 構建的靜態站點，使用 Tera 模板主題（Bifrost）與 SCSS 樣式。構建在一條公開的 CI 流水線中運行。Pull Request 受歡迎，用於 Bug 修復、可訪問性改進、性能工作，以及契合項目學術語域的小型功能。
對於更大的改動——視覺重設計、導航重構、新的內容版塊——請先開啟一個 Discussion。
財務支持
項目目前完全由作者自掏腰包資助。通過 Open Collective 提供的自願捐助將用於託管、基礎設施與翻譯工作。CC0 許可證意味著任何人——包括項目自身——都無法獨佔地將內容貨幣化。財務支持是真正自願的，只用於讓項目持續運轉。
實際中貢獻長什麼樣
一份好的貢獻會說明它在改什麼、為什麼改、依據為何。一個修復某 Wiki 條目失效鏈接的 Pull Request 只需一行描述。一個修訂實質性解讀的 Pull Request 需要更多——至少要給出新解讀的來源，以及一段說明它為何優於現有解讀的文字。
項目的編輯標準同樣適用於貢獻：學術語域、對來源敏感、對論斷類型給出誠實的標註。倉庫旁維護的內容規則詳細描述了這些標準。
如果你不確定某個貢獻是否合適，請先開啟一個 Discussion。作者會直接告訴你，並可能為該貢獻建議更合適的形式。提問不會受罰。

title: 行為準則
body:
Wheel of Heaven 是一個開放的項目。歡迎任何人閱讀語料庫、與其論斷互動、提議更正、提出異議、貢獻翻譯，或建議新的方向。本頁描述了項目對所有在其公共空間——GitHub Discussions、問題追蹤器、Pull Request，以及項目未來可能新增的任何渠道——中參與者的期望標準。
承諾
項目承諾成為這樣一個空間：參與不取決於背景、身份，或事先認同語料庫的框架。實質性的不同意見是受歡迎的。基於身份的敵意則不是。項目認真對待這兩條承諾，而後者會在出現時被強制執行。
鼓勵的做法

與語料庫的實質內容互動——包括對其提出挑戰
提出誠實的問題，即使作者在別處可能已經回答過
在回應前認真閱讀，並引用你所回應的對象
在存在不確定性的地方承認自己的不確定
直接指出錯誤，並附上更正的來源
翻譯、引用、在其上繼續創作或重新發布作品（CC0 許可證主動邀請這樣做）

不歡迎的做法

針對任何參與者的人身攻擊、騷擾，或有針對性的敵意
基於身份、背景或信仰的歧視
釣魚挑釁、反覆的惡意參與，或試圖讓實質性討論脫軌
未經他人同意公開其他參與者的私人信息
改宗勸說——無論是為或反對語料庫的框架。項目不尋求皈依者，也無意從任何方向參與對抗性運動。

不同意見是受歡迎的；騷擾則不是
二者並非一回事，項目認真對待這種區分。一位讀者若認為語料庫錯了、認為雷爾派的原始材料是編造的、認為歲差框架是牽強的，或對項目在某一具體問題上的立場感到不被說服，是受歡迎在公共空間中說出來的。作者寧願聽到一份誠實的反對，也不要一份虛偽的贊同。
不受歡迎的，是利用公共空間因參與者是誰、相信什麼、來自何處、認同何種傳統而攻擊他們本人。實質內容是開放的；人則不是。
執行
作者負責審核項目的公共空間，並保留刪除內容、鎖定話題、或封禁違反此準則之參與者的權利。執行旨在做到比例適當且透明：輕微違規通常會獲得一條說明哪裡不妥的備註；反覆或嚴重的違規可能導致移除。
如要舉報違規，請在倉庫上開啟一個 Issue；或對不應公開的事項，通過 GitHub 上權威行為準則中列出的渠道直接聯繫維護者。

title: 關於
body:
一種長讀
Wheel of Heaven 是透過一條工作假設來閱讀古代世界的創造傳統：希伯來聖經稱為 埃洛希姆 的存在——一個複數名詞，被翻譯為單數的「神」所遮蔽——是來自他處的一支小型且高度發達的人類文明；他們來到這裡，準備了這顆行星，設計了地球上的生命，並在宗教文本中留下了記錄。
這一閱讀跨越歲差週期的十二個時代：從大約兩萬兩千年前項目的開端起，穿過宗教傳統中所記錄的漫長的設計與介入序列，直至語料庫主張我們正身處其中的當下「揭示時代」。語料庫的十二個主章按序行走這道弧線。
這一框架以雷爾派的原始材料——主要是 講述真相的書（克勞德·沃利隆，1974年）——為主要的解讀透鏡。圍繞這一透鏡，它沿著約 25,920 年的歲差運動，整合聖經、美索不達米亞、吠陀、中美洲及其他比較材料。項目也依託喬治奧·德·桑蒂利亞納與赫塔·馮·德欽德的歲差神話學研究（Hamlet's Mill，1969年），以及讓·桑迪的聖經重釋（1968–1972年）。
它不是什麼
本項目不是雷爾派運動的出版物。它由一位雷爾派人士執筆，但語料庫實質上超出了雷爾派的標準制度化自我呈現，包含運動方面尚未正式認可、也可能永遠不會正式認可的解釋性主張。
它不是一般性的「古代太空人」內容。項目共享那一傳統的根本主張，但使用一套特定的、由源頭規訓的框架，使其區別於更廣義的相關文獻。
它不是宗教崇敬性的材料。語料庫把宗教文本作為某一高度發達文明所記錄工作之歷史見證來閱讀，而不是作為崇拜對象。它不要求信仰，不設崇拜活動，也不提供屬靈權威。
它不是已完成的綜合。本站正在積極開發中。頁面會被修訂。這一閱讀是臨時性的。
誰在背後
Wheel of Heaven 由扎拉·欽斯弗斯撰寫。作為獨立讀者與雷爾派人士，她花了十五年來梳理語料庫所呈現的這一框架，然後才將它向公眾交流開放。項目以一位作者的第一人稱單數聲音進行，並向合作者開放。
語料庫面向那些願意認真投入的讀者——無論這種投入最終把他們帶向何處。它不以招募為目的，也不要求讀者加入任何東西。它只要求人們誠實地以證據來檢驗這一框架。

title: Eridu-Genesis
body:
Eridu-Genesis ist die moderne Bezeichnung für die sumerische
Erzählung, die auf den Nippur-Tafeln CBS 4561 und CBS 4611
überliefert ist — der älteste bekannte Bericht über das Paradies,
die Erschaffung der Menschheit und die Sintflut. Die Tafeln sind
älter als das babylonische Enuma Elisch und das akkadische
Atra-ḫasis und liefern die frühesten erhaltenen Parallelen zur
biblischen Urgeschichte.

Der Volltext ist derzeit nur auf Englisch verfügbar.
Siehe die englische Ausgabe.

title: Das Buch, das die Wahrheit verkündet
Extraterrestrials Took Me to Their Planet
프레스 키트
body:
기자, 편집자, 퍼블리셔를 위해
  프레스 키트
  Wheel of Heaven에 대해 쓰기 위해 필요한 모든 것. 브랜드 자산, 세 가지 길이의 보일러플레이트, 팩트시트, 팔레트와 타이포그래피, 언론 문의 — 모두 CC0-1.0 라이선스.
  
    브랜드 키트 다운로드 (.zip, 1.9 MB)
    언론 이메일
  


Wheel of Heaven 소개
세 가지 길이의 보일러플레이트. 복사는 둘러싼 마크업 없이 텍스트만 가져옵니다.

  
    한 문장 약 35 단어
    복사
  
  Wheel of Heaven은 고대 창조 전통을 작업 가설을 통해 읽는 개방형 다국어 프로젝트입니다: 엘로힘이라 불리는 존재는 지구의 생명을 설계한 작지만 진보한 인류 문명이었다는 가설.


  
    짧은 단락 약 90 단어
    복사
  
  Wheel of Heaven은 종교 문헌을 실제 사건—엘로힘이라 불리는 진보한 인류 문명에 의한 지상 생명의 엔지니어링—에 대한 부분적으로 왜곡된 기록으로 읽고, 대년의 12개 세차 시대를 통해 이 사건을 추적합니다. 이 읽기는 시험되어야 할 가설로 유지되며, 교리가 아닙니다. 각 페이지에는 그 주된 주장을 직접적, 추론적, 또는 사변적으로 분류하는 작은 배지가 있습니다. 작업은 무료이며, 출처에 충실하고, 증거가 바뀌면 읽기도 바뀔 수 있도록 열려 있습니다.


  
    확장 설명 약 180 단어
    
  
  Wheel of Heaven은 고대 세계의 창조 전통—라엘리안, 성경, 메소포타미아, 그 외—을 하나의 작업 가설을 통해 읽는 개방형 다국어 프로젝트입니다. 그 가설은: 엘로힘(Elohim)이라 불리는 존재가 여기에 와서 지구의 생명을 설계하고 종교 문헌에 그 기록을 남긴, 작지만 진보한 인류 문명이었다는 것입니다.
  이 읽기는 세차 운동 주기의 12개 시대에 걸쳐 있으며, 프로젝트의 시작인 22,000년 전부터 현재 계시의 시대를 거쳐, 다음 대년이 열어가는 긴 미래까지 이어집니다.
  이 사이트는 무료이며, 출처에 충실하고, 작업이 검증될 수 있도록 구축되었습니다. 각 페이지에는 인식론적 배지—직접적, 추론적, 또는 사변적—가 있어 독자가 어떤 종류의 주장을 보고 있는지 알 수 있습니다. 코퍼스는 9개 언어로 CC0-1.0 라이선스 하에 발행되며, 소스 코드는 github.com/wheelofheaven에서 열려 있습니다. 증거가 바뀌면 읽기도 바뀝니다.



간단한 팩트

  정식 명칭Wheel of Heaven
  짧은 형태WoH(본문 첫 언급 이후)
  발음휠 · 오브 · 헤븐(영어식)
  카테고리비교 종교 · 고대 우주인 연구 · 열린 정전
  설립2023년(공개) — 기반 작업은 약 10년에 걸침
  상태활성 · 약 1,500페이지 공개 · 매주 추가
  언어9개 — 영어, 독일어, 프랑스어, 스페인어, 러시아어, 일본어, 중국어(간체), 중국어(번체), 한국어
  라이선스콘텐츠 CC0-1.0 · 코드 MIT
  웹사이트wheelofheaven.world
  소스github.com/wheelofheaven
  언론 문의press@wheelofheaven.world



브랜드 이름 — 표기 방법

  
    사용
    
      Wheel of Heaven — 프로젝트 이름
      엘로힘 — 항상 복수로
      라엘, 라엘리안 — 움라우트 유지
      작업 가설 — 중심 주장 설명 시
      WoH — 본문 첫 언급 이후만
    
  
  
    사용하지 않음
    
      WHEEL OF HEAVEN — 대문자는 브랜드 칩 전용
      wheelofheaven — 붙여 쓰면 가독성 저하
      raelian, raelism — 움라우트 유지
      교리, 이론, 신앙 체계 — 읽기로
      고대 외계인, 비밀의 역사 — 공유하지 않는 다른 프레임
    
  



로고 & 자산
모든 로고는 CC0-1.0으로 공개됩니다. 허가 불필요. 표기 환영, 의무 아님.
로고마크 — 육각형 심볼

title: 행동 강령
body:
Wheel of Heaven은 열린 프로젝트이다. 누구나 코퍼스를 읽고, 그 주장에 관여하고, 정정을 제안하고, 이의를 제기하고, 번역에 기여하고, 새로운 방향을 제안하는 것이 환영된다. 이 페이지는 프로젝트의 공공 공간 — GitHub Discussions, 이슈 트래커, 풀 리퀘스트, 그리고 프로젝트가 향후 추가할 수 있는 모든 채널 — 에 참여하는 모든 사람에게 프로젝트가 기대하는 기준을 기술한다.
약속
프로젝트는 출신, 정체성, 또는 코퍼스의 틀에 대한 사전 동의에 참여가 의존하지 않는 공간이 되기로 약속한다. 실질적인 의견 차이는 환영된다. 정체성에 기반한 적대감은 그렇지 않다. 프로젝트는 이 두 약속을 진지하게 받아들이며, 후자는 발생하는 곳에서 시행된다.
권장되는 것

코퍼스의 실체에 관여하기 — 그것에 도전하는 것을 포함하여
저자가 다른 곳에서 이미 답했을 수 있는 질문을 포함하여, 정직한 질문을 던지기
응답하기 전에 주의 깊게 읽고, 응답하는 대상을 인용하기
자기 자신의 불확실성을, 그것이 존재하는 곳에서 인정하기
정정의 근거와 함께 오류를 직접 지적하기
작품을 번역, 인용, 발전시키거나 재출판하기(CC0 라이선스가 이를 적극적으로 초대한다)

환영되지 않는 것

어떤 참여자에 대한 인신공격, 괴롭힘, 또는 표적화된 적대감
정체성, 출신, 또는 신념에 근거한 차별
트롤링, 반복되는 악의적 관여, 또는 실질적 토론을 탈선시키려는 시도
다른 참여자의 사적 정보를 동의 없이 공개하기
개종 활동 — 코퍼스의 틀에 찬성하든 반대하든. 프로젝트는 개종자를 구하지 않으며, 어느 방향에서도 반대 캠페인에 관심이 없다.

의견 차이는 환영되며, 괴롭힘은 그렇지 않다
이 둘은 같은 것이 아니며, 프로젝트는 그 구별을 진지하게 받아들인다. 코퍼스가 틀렸다고 생각하는 독자, 라엘리안 원전 자료가 조작되었다고 생각하는 독자, 세차 운동 틀이 강제되었다고 생각하는 독자, 또는 특정 문제에 대한 프로젝트의 입장이 설득력 없다고 느끼는 독자는 공공 공간에서 그것을 말하는 것이 환영된다. 저자는 거짓된 동의보다 정직한 이의를 듣고 싶어 한다.
환영되지 않는 것은 공공 공간을 이용하여 참여자가 누구인지, 무엇을 믿는지, 어디에서 왔는지, 어떤 전통과 동일시하는지를 두고 그들을 공격하는 것이다. 실체는 열려 있다; 사람들은 그렇지 않다.
시행
저자는 프로젝트의 공공 공간을 조정하며, 이 코드를 위반하는 행동을 보이는 참여자의 콘텐츠를 제거하거나 스레드를 잠그거나 참여자를 차단할 권리를 보유한다. 시행은 비례적이고 투명하게 이루어지도록 의도된다 — 경미한 위반에는 보통 무엇이 어긋났는지를 설명하는 메모가 따르며, 반복되거나 심각한 위반은 제거로 이어질 수 있다.
위반을 신고하려면, 저장소에서 이슈를 열거나, 공개되어서는 안 되는 사안에 대해서는 GitHub의 정본 행동 강령에 나열된 채널을 통해 관리자에게 연락한다.

title: 프로젝트 소개
body:
긴 독해
Wheel of Heaven은 고대 세계의 창조 전통을 하나의 작업 가설을 통해 읽는다. 즉, 히브리어 성경이 엘로힘이라 부르는 존재들 — 단수 「하나님」으로 번역되어 가려진 복수 명사 — 은 다른 곳에서 온 작은 진보된 인간 문명이었으며, 여기에 와서 행성을 준비하고, 지구 위에 생명을 설계하고, 종교 텍스트 속에 기록을 남겼다는 가설이다.
이 독해는 세차 운동 주기의 열두 시대를 가로지른다. 약 이만 이천 년 전 프로젝트의 시작에서, 종교 전통에 기록된 설계와 개입의 긴 연속을 거쳐, 코퍼스가 우리가 지금 그 안에 있다고 주장하는 현재의 개시 시대에 이르기까지. 코퍼스의 열두 주요 장은 이 호를 순서대로 걷는다.
이 틀은 주된 해석 렌즈로서 라엘리안 원전 자료 — 주로 진리를 말하는 책(클로드 보릴롱, 1974년) — 에 의지한다. 그 렌즈를 중심으로, 약 25,920년에 걸친 분점의 세차 운동을 따라 성경·메소포타미아·베다·메소아메리카 등의 비교 자료를 모은다. 프로젝트는 또한 조르조 데 산틸라나와 헤르타 폰 데헨트의 세차 신화 연구(Hamlet's Mill, 1969년), 그리고 장 상디의 성경 재해석(1968–1972년)에 의지한다.
이 프로젝트가 아닌 것
이 프로젝트는 라엘리안 운동의 출판물이 아니다. 라엘리안에 의해 저술되지만, 코퍼스는 라엘리즘의 표준적 기관 자기제시를 실질적으로 넘어서며, 운동이 공식적으로 승인하지 않았고 앞으로도 공식적으로 승인하지 않을 수 있는 해석적 움직임들을 포함한다.
이것은 일반적인 고대 우주인 콘텐츠가 아니다. 프로젝트는 그 전통의 기초 주장을 공유하지만, 더 넓은 문헌으로부터 그것을 구별짓는 특정하고 원전에 규율된 틀을 사용한다.
이것은 종교적 헌신 자료가 아니다. 코퍼스는 종교 텍스트를 숭배 대상이 아니라 진보된 문명의 기록된 작업에 대한 역사적 증언으로 읽는다. 신앙을 요구하지 않으며, 헌신 의례를 갖지 않으며, 영적 권위를 제공하지 않는다.
이것은 완성된 종합이 아니다. 사이트는 활발히 개발 중이다. 페이지는 개정된다. 독해는 잠정적이다.
누가 뒤에 있는가
Wheel of Heaven은 자라 진스푸스가 쓴다. 독립적 독자이자 라엘리안인 그녀는 코퍼스가 제시하는 틀을 공적 참여에 열기 전에 십오 년에 걸쳐 가다듬었다. 프로젝트는 한 저자의 일인칭 단수의 목소리로 이루어지며, 협력자들에게 열려 있다.
코퍼스는 진지한 관여를 기꺼이 베풀 독자들에게 제공된다. 그 관여가 결국 어디로 그들을 이끌든 상관없이. 그것은 모집을 목표로 하지 않으며, 독자에게 어딘가에 가입하라고 요구하지 않는다. 다만 틀이 증거에 대해 정직하게 시험되기를 요구한다.

title: 쿠키 정책
body:
Wheel of Heaven은 정적 사이트이다. 백엔드도, 데이터베이스도, 사용자 계정 시스템도 없다. 쿠키는 필수 환경 설정에만 사용된다. 추적도, 프로파일링도, 제3자 광고도 없다.
쿠키란
쿠키는 웹사이트를 방문할 때 브라우저가 기기에 저장하는 작은 텍스트 파일이다. 사이트가 작동하기 위해 꼭 필요한 종류(라이트/다크 테마 기억, 어느 언어로 읽고 있는지 기억 등)가 있는가 하면, 추적자가 웹상의 활동 프로필을 구축하기 위해 사용하는 종류도 있다. 이 사이트는 전자만을 사용하고 후자는 사용하지 않는다.
사이트가 저장하는 것
이 사이트는 엄격히 기능적인 소수의 환경 설정을 위해 브라우저의 로컬 스토리지(기술적으로는 localStorage로, 이 정책의 목적상 쿠키에 준해 다룬다)를 사용한다:

테마 — 라이트 또는 다크 모드. 페이지를 넘어갈 때마다 사이트가 다른 테마를 깜빡이지 않도록 한다.
언어 — 지원되는 아홉 개 번역 중 당신이 읽고 있는 것. 매 페이지마다 다시 선택할 필요가 없도록 한다.
고지 확인 플래그 — 「이것은 작업 가설이다」 배너를 당신이 닫았음을 기록하는 1비트 플래그. 매번 방문할 때마다 다시 표시되지 않게 한다.

이 가운데 어느 것도 당신의 기기를 떠나지 않는다. 어떤 것도 식별자에 연결되지 않는다. 어떤 것도 제3자에게 전송되지 않는다.
사이트가 하지 않는 것
이 사이트는 페이지·세션·사이트를 가로질러 당신의 행동을 추적하지 않는다. 당신이 누구이며 무엇을 읽는지에 대한 프로필을 구축하지 않는다. 광고나 마케팅 쿠키를 설치하지 않는다. 제3자의 분석 스크립트를 실행하지 않는다. 데이터를 누구에게도 판매하거나 공유하지 않는다.
「분석」에 가장 가까운 것은 호스팅 제공자가 일반적인 서버 운영을 위해 요청 수준에서 보관하는 로그(IP, 사용자 에이전트, 요청 경로)이다. 그 로그들은 호스팅 제공자의 것이지 프로젝트의 것이 아니다. 사이트 측에서는 어떤 식별자와도 결합되지 않는다 — 사이트에 결합할 식별자 자체가 없기 때문이다.
제3자
이 사이트는 제3자 추적 스크립트를 삽입하지 않는다. 어떤 페이지가 외부 자원에 링크하는 경우 — 예를 들어 GitHub Discussions나 위키백과 참조 — 그 링크는 당신이 클릭해야만 발효된다. 그 링크를 따라가 발생하는 일은 본 사이트가 아니라 해당 사이트의 정책에 의해 규율된다.
환경 설정 삭제
사이트에 저장된 환경 설정은 브라우저 설정을 통해 언제든 삭제할 수 있다(일반적으로: 사이트 설정 → 쿠키 및 사이트 데이터 → wheelofheaven.world의 데이터 삭제). 사이트는 계속 작동할 것이며, 다음 방문 시 당신의 테마와 언어를 잊은 채 동작할 뿐이다.
이 정책의 변경
프로젝트가 사이트가 저장하는 것을 향후 변경하는 경우 — 예컨대 어느 시점에 옵트인 방식의 분석을 도입하는 경우 — 이 페이지가 갱신되고 변경 사항은 릴리스 노트에 표시된다. 코퍼스의 CC0 라이선스는 이 정책에도 적용된다: 자유롭게 복사, 수정, 재사용해도 된다.
연락처
문의는 GitHub Discussions에 스레드를 열거나, 저장소에 이슈를 등록해 주십시오.

title: 개인정보 처리방침
body:
Wheel of Heaven은 정적 사이트이다. 백엔드도, 데이터베이스도, 계정 시스템도 없고, 이 도메인에 호스팅되는 댓글 섹션도 없으며, 분석 도구도 없다. 프로젝트의 프라이버시 자세는 메커니즘을 관리하는 것이 아니라 그것이 부재하다는 것이다 — 프라이버시 정책이 말할 것이 거의 없다는 것이 바로 이 페이지의 요지이다.
프로젝트가 수집하지 않는 것
사이트는 다음을 수집하지 않는다:

이름, 이메일 주소, 전화번호, 또는 다른 개인 식별자
사용자 계정, 로그인 자격 증명, 세션 데이터
폼 제출(이 도메인에는 폼이 존재하지 않는다)
이 도메인에서의 댓글, 게시물, 사용자 생성 콘텐츠
분석 또는 추적 데이터 — Google Analytics 없음, Plausible 없음, Matomo 없음, 자체 텔레메트리도 없음
광고, 마케팅, 또는 크로스사이트 추적용 쿠키
프로젝트 측에서의 IP 주소나 위치 데이터

이것은 프로젝트가 신중하게 지키려고 하는 약속이 아니다. 그것은 사이트가 어떻게 만들어졌는가의 한 속성이다: 이들 가운데 어떤 것도 수행할 서버 측 코드가 존재하지 않는다.
프로젝트가 저장하는 것
프로젝트는 브라우저의 로컬 스토리지에 소수의 작은 환경 설정을 저장한다 — 테마, 언어, 면책 조항 확인. 이것들은 당신의 기기를 떠나지 않는다. 전체 목록은 쿠키 정책을 참조하라.
제3자가 볼 수 있는 것
사이트를 방문할 때 몇몇 불가피한 제3자가 일반적인 HTTP 수준의 정보를 볼 수 있다:

호스팅 제공자 는 서비스 운영을 위해 표준적인 서버 로그(IP, 사용자 에이전트, 요청된 경로)를 유지한다. 프로젝트는 분석이나 프로파일링을 위해 이 로그에 접근하지 않는다.
외부 링크 — GitHub, 위키백과 또는 기타 링크된 사이트로 클릭해 나가면, 그 사이트가 무엇을 수집하는지는 그 사이트의 정책이 다스린다. 프로젝트는 링크된 사이트를 통제하지도, 그들과 데이터를 공유하지도 않는다.
외부 자산 — 사용되는 경우 폰트는 자체 호스팅된다; 프로젝트는 당신을 추적할 수 있는 제3자 CDN으로부터 폰트, 스크립트, 스타일시트를 로드하지 않는다.

이것이 어떤 시점에 바뀐다면 — 예를 들어 프로젝트가 옵트인 분석을 추가하는 경우 — 이 페이지는 갱신되고 변경 사항은 릴리스 노트에 표시된다.
당신의 권리
EU GDPR, 스위스 FADP, UK GDPR, 캘리포니아 CCPA 및 기타 프라이버시 규제 아래, 당신은 서비스가 보유한 당신에 관한 개인 데이터에 접근·수정·삭제할 권리가 있다. 프로젝트는 당신에 관한 개인 데이터를 보유하지 않으므로, 접근·수정·삭제할 것이 없다. 프로젝트가 당신에 관한 데이터를 실수로 보유하고 있다고 생각된다면, 연락해 주십시오 — 가장 가능성 있는 설명은 오해이며, 프로젝트는 그것을 직접 해결하고자 한다.
어린이
사이트는 미성년자를 포함한 모든 독자에게 열려 있지만, 종교적·역사적 자료에 관심이 있는 성인 독자를 위해 쓰였다. 프로젝트는 미성년자를 포함해 누구로부터도 알면서 데이터를 수집하지 않는다.
이 정책의 변경
프로젝트가 데이터 처리 방식을 향후 변경하는 경우 — 예를 들어 옵트인 분석, 댓글, 또는 어떤 백엔드 기능을 추가하는 경우 — 이 페이지는 갱신되고 변경 사항은 릴리스 노트에 표시된다. 코퍼스의 CC0 라이선스는 이 정책에도 적용된다: 자유롭게 복사, 수정, 재사용할 수 있다.
연락처
이 정책에 대한 질문은 GitHub Discussions에 스레드를 열거나 저장소에 이슈를 등록해 주십시오. 공개되어서는 안 되는 프라이버시 특정 사안은 프로젝트의 행동 강령에 나열된 채널을 통해 관리자에게 연락해 주십시오.

title: 토론
body:
프로젝트의 공공 포럼은 GitHub Discussions이다. 질문하고, 이의를 제기하고, 대안적 독해를 제안하고, 자료를 제안하고, 번역 작업을 조정하거나, 그 외 코퍼스에 공개적으로 관여하기에 올바른 장소이다.
저자는 읽고 응답한다. 응답이 항상 즉각적이지는 않다 — 프로젝트는 요구가 많은 직업 생활의 가장자리에서 이루어진다 — 하지만 실질적인 모든 스레드는 진정한 답을 받는다.
무엇을 위한 것인가
질문
FAQ가 아직 다루지 않은 모든 것, 또는 FAQ 답변이 후속 질문을 일으키는 곳. FAQ 자체가 Discussions 스레드에서 자란다: 반복되는 좋은 질문은 거기에서 답변되어 끝날 수 있다.
이의와 대안적 독해
프로젝트의 입장은 틀이 방어해야 할 교리가 아니라 시험해야 할 작업 가설이라는 것이다. 의견 차이는 환영된다. 당신이 원전 자료를 코퍼스와 다르게 읽거나, 학문적 합의가 어딘가에서 잘못 표현되고 있다고 생각하거나, 특정 해석적 움직임이 설득력 없다고 느낀다면, Discussions는 그것을 말하기에 올바른 장소이다.
저자는 거짓된 동의보다 정직한 이의를 듣고 싶어 한다. 실질적 도전은 코퍼스를 개선하는 것들 중 하나이다.
자료 제안
프로젝트가 관여해야 할 자료 — 일차 텍스트, 학문적 연구, 비판적 독해, 코퍼스가 아직 잘 다루지 않은 전통의 평행 — 를 알고 있다면, Discussions가 그것을 알릴 장소이다. 인용, 자료가 왜 중요한지에 대한 한 단락, 그리고 이상적으로는 그것이 관련될 코퍼스 내의 특정 페이지나 구절을 포함하십시오.
번역 조정
사이트는 아홉 개 언어로 출판되며, 추가 번역은 환영된다. 번역 작업은 Discussions를 통해 조정된다: 범위, 용어집, 스타일 질문, 검토.
소개
프로젝트가 처음이고 안녕 인사를 하고 싶다면, Discussions에는 소개 카테고리가 있다. 참여자들이 자신을 소개해야 한다는 기대는 없다 — 프로젝트는 그저 보기만 하는 독자들도 환영한다.
무엇을 위한 것이 아닌가

특정 페이지에 대한 사실적 정정 — 그것은 이슈 트래커로 가며, Discussions로 가지 않는다.
코드 또는 인프라 작업 — 풀 리퀘스트와 이슈가 관련 저장소로 가며, Discussions로 가지 않는다.
저자에 대한 사적 메시지 — Discussions는 설계상 공개이다. 무언가가 정말로 사적이어야 한다면, 프로젝트의 행동 강령이 적절한 채널을 기술한다.

등록에 대해
Discussions는 공공 공간이며 프로젝트의 행동 강령을 따른다. 실질적인 의견 차이는 환영된다; 인신공격, 괴롭힘, 표적화된 적대감은 그렇지 않다. 게시하기 전에 아직 읽지 않았다면 행동 강령을 읽으십시오.
프로젝트의 학술적 등록은 Discussions에도 적용되지만, 코퍼스 자체보다 더 느슨하다. 저자는 거기에서 코퍼스를 쓸 때와 같은 목소리로 쓴다 — 직접적이고, 자료를 인식하며, 주장에 신중하게 — 그리고 그것이 가장 유용한 응답을 얻는 등록이다.

title: 기여
body:
Wheel of Heaven은 CC0에 따른 오픈 소스이며 기여자들을 환영한다. 프로젝트는 한 저자의 일인칭 단수의 목소리로 이루어지지만, 주변 작업 — 번역, 편집, 인프라, 공공 토론 — 은 많은 손에서 이익을 얻는다.
기여자들이 프로젝트의 틀에 동의할 필요는 없다. 비판적 관여는 환영된다.
시작하기 전에
행동 강령을 읽으십시오. 프로젝트의 공공 공간 — Discussions, 이슈, 풀 리퀘스트 — 에 대한 참여는 그것을 전제로 한다.
FAQ를 훑어보십시오, 특히 작업 가설, 자료 가족, 그리고 프로젝트가 주장 유형을 다루는 방식에 대한 항목들. 그것들은 대부분의 기여를 쉽게 만드는 맥락을 제공한다.
기여하는 방법
토론과 질문
GitHub Discussions는 프로젝트의 주된 공공 포럼이다. 정직한 질문, 실질적인 이의, 대안적 독해, 새로운 자료가 모두 거기에서 환영된다. 스레드는 때때로 코퍼스로 직접 다시 흘러들어간다 — 날카로운 질문은 위키 항목이나 FAQ 답변에 반영되어 끝날 수 있다.
번역
사이트는 영어를 원천으로 하여 아홉 개 언어로 출판된다. 번역은 영어 원본에서 손과 도구로 파생되며, 가능한 경우 편집 검토가 이루어진다. 추가 언어는 환영된다; 기존 번역은 언제나 개선될 수 있다.
번역에 관심이 있다면, 언어와 범위를 기술하는 Discussion 스레드 또는 이슈를 여십시오. 프로젝트는 원본 자료, 프로젝트 특정 용어 용어집, 스타일 가이드를 제공한다.
콘텐츠 정정 및 제안
사이트의 페이지가 사실적으로 틀렸거나, 깨진 링크가 있거나, 자료를 잘못 인용했거나, 학문적 입장을 잘못 표현한 경우, 프로젝트는 모르는 것보다 알기를 선호한다. 페이지 URL과 구체적인 정정을 첨부하여 저장소에 이슈를 여십시오.
해석적 의견 차이 — 당신이 자료를 코퍼스와 다르게 읽는 경우 — 는 이슈가 아니라 Discussions에 속한다. 프로젝트는 이를 환영하지만, 사실 정정과는 다른 종류의 기여이다.
코드와 인프라
사이트는 Zola로 빌드된 정적 사이트이며, Tera 템플릿 테마(Bifrost)와 SCSS 스타일을 사용한다. 빌드는 공개 CI 파이프라인에서 실행된다. 버그 수정, 접근성 개선, 성능 작업, 그리고 프로젝트의 학술적 등록에 맞는 작은 기능에 대한 풀 리퀘스트가 환영된다.
더 큰 변경 — 시각적 재설계, 내비게이션 재구성, 새로운 콘텐츠 섹션 — 의 경우, 먼저 Discussion을 여십시오.
재정 지원
프로젝트는 현재 저자의 사비로 전적으로 운영된다. Open Collective를 통한 자발적 기여는 호스팅, 인프라, 그리고 번역 작업에 사용된다. CC0 라이선스는 콘텐츠가 프로젝트 자체를 포함한 누구에 의해서도 독점적으로 수익화될 수 없음을 의미한다 — 재정 지원은 진정으로 자발적이며, 프로젝트의 운영에만 사용된다.
기여는 실제로 어떻게 보이는가
좋은 기여는 무엇을, 왜, 어떤 근거로 변경하는지를 명명한다. 위키 항목의 깨진 링크를 고치는 풀 리퀘스트는 한 줄 설명이 필요하다. 실질적 독해를 수정하는 풀 리퀘스트는 더 많이 필요하다 — 최소한 새로운 독해의 자료와 그것이 현재의 것을 어떻게 개선하는지에 대한 한 단락.
프로젝트의 편집 기준은 기여에도 적용된다: 학술적 등록, 자료 인식, 주장 유형을 정직하게 표시. 저장소와 함께 관리되는 콘텐츠 규칙이 이를 자세히 기술한다.
기여가 적합한지 확신이 들지 않으면, 먼저 Discussion을 여십시오. 저자는 직접 그렇게 말할 것이고, 기여에 더 나은 형태를 제안할 수 있다. 묻는 것에는 벌점이 없다.

title: Articles
body:
Articles
Articles are evergreen Explainers — long-form, thesis-driven analyses of ideas at the heart of the Wheel of Heaven hypothesis. They take their time. Each one carries a six-source minimum and a declared claim_type so you know exactly what kind of claim you're reading.
What an Explainer is

Built around an idea, not an event
Comprehensive: background, argument, counterarguments, references
Sourced: Raëlian canon, ancient primary, scholarly, scientific/historical, comparative, critical
Stable: updated when the argument changes, not when the news cycle does

Look for the "Explainer" label to identify these deep-dive articles.
Looking for current events?
If you came here for commentary on something that just happened — a discovery, an announcement, a cultural moment — see the Newsroom instead. Dispatches are short, dated, and read events through the canon. An Explainer never reduces to a Dispatch; a Dispatch sometimes seeds a future Explainer.
Browse Articles
Use the filters and search to discover content that interests you, or browse by date to see the latest.

title: Example Explainer: Understanding Complex Topics
body:
Understanding Complex Topics: A Comprehensive Guide
Welcome to this example explainer that demonstrates how we break down complex subjects into understandable, actionable insights. This format allows us to explore topics in depth while maintaining clarity and accessibility.
What Makes This Format Special?
Our explainer format is designed with several key principles in mind:
Comprehensive Coverage
Unlike brief articles or simple summaries, explainers dive deep into topics, providing the context and detail needed for true understanding.
Clear Structure
Each explainer follows a logical progression, building concepts step by step to ensure readers can follow along regardless of your starting knowledge level.
Rich Context
We don't just tell you what something is – we explain why it matters, how it connects to other concepts, and where you might encounter it in practice.
Types of Insights
Conventional Wisdom

The greatest enemy of knowledge is not ignorance, it is the illusion of knowledge.
Stephen Hawking

This represents standard academic or widely accepted perspectives on the topic.
Different Perspectives

Every great advance in science has issued from a new audacity of imagination.

These showcase insights from specific authors, researchers, or thought leaders in the field.

The truth is not always beautiful, nor beautiful words the truth.

These sections contain deeper, often transformative insights that challenge conventional understanding.
Core Components
Hero Section
At the top of each explainer, you'll find a landscape header image that visually represents the topic. When no specific image is available, we generate an attractive gradient background that matches the content category.
Alternative Names
Many complex topics are known by different names or have various spellings. We list these alternatives to help you recognize the concept in different contexts.
Executive Summary
Every explainer begins with a concise summary that gives you the key points upfront. This

title: Newsroom
body:
Newsroom
The Newsroom is where we read current events through the canon. Each entry — a Dispatch — anchors to something that happened: a discovery, an announcement, an anniversary, a cultural moment. The angle is what the canon makes of it.
Dispatches vs Explainers
Dispatches are short, dated, and decay. They aren't trying to be definitive — they're trying to be current. If you want the evergreen, thesis-driven treatment of a topic, see Articles, where Explainers do the slow work.
A Dispatch can seed a future Explainer; an Explainer never gets reduced to a Dispatch.
What you won't find here

Breaking-news aggregation. We aren't trying to be a wire service.
Sensational framing. Same scholarly register as the rest of the site.
Proselytizing. Dispatches invite inquiry; they don't conclude for the reader.

title: PURSUE Release 01: U.S. Opens UAP Files to the Public
白羊座时代（公元前 2'370—210）
body:
The Age of Aries lasts from –2'370 to –210 and follows the Age of Taurus which lasted up to –2'370.

Moses

In Exodus, we appeared to Moses.

And the angel of Yahweh appeared unto him in a flame of fire out of the midst of a bush: and he looked, and, behold, the bush burned with fire, and the bush was not consumed. Exodus 3: 2.


The passage describes a significant event in the Hebrew Bible when Moses, a key figure in Judaism, encountered an angel of Yahweh, the God of Israel. The angel appeared to Moses in a flame of fire that was emanating from a bush. Despite the fire, the bush was not consumed or burnt. This miraculous occurrence caught Moses' attention, and he approached the bush. From within the bush, the angel of Yahweh spoke to Moses and revealed his divine mission to lead the Hebrew people out of slavery in Egypt and into the Promised Land. Moses was chosen for a special mission.

A rocket landed in front of him, and his description corresponds to what a Brazilian tribesman might say today if we were to land before him in a flying vessel illuminating the trees without burning them.

This passage suggests that the description given in the Bible of the appearance of an angel of Yahweh in Exodus 3:2 may have been the result of an encounter with an extraterrestrial spacecraft. The author is drawing a comparison between the experience of Moses and the possible experience of a Brazilian tribesman encountering a modern-day spacecraft, implying that both encounters may have been similar in nature. The reference to illuminating the trees without burning them suggests that the spacecraft may have had some kind of advanced technology that allowed it to land without causing damage to the surrounding environment.

The people chosen as the most intelligent had lost their most brilliant minds and had become slaves to neighboring tribes who were more numerous since they had not undergone the same destruction. It was thus necessary to restore dignity to the people of Israel

title: 射手座时代
body:
The Age of Sagittarius lasts from –19'650 to –17'490 and follows the Age of Capricorn which lasted up to –19'650.
In the last chapter, The Age of Capricorn, we learned that a group of scientifically inclined spacefaring pioneers managed to find an exoplanet that provided all elements necessary to produce artifical life, including water. The planet they've found was covered in water and mist, and didn't harbour any life at the moment of its discovery. They went on to build a network of artifical satellites to study the planet. They themselves were orbiting the planet in a what we would call a space station while studying and evaluating the data they were gathering while doing so. Eventually, the data started to become clear in answering the question whether or not the planet would be able to support life and they decided to go on with their work.
All of that happened during the Age of Capricorn which lasted from –21'810 to –19'650, one of the twelve precessional World Ages. Another appellation of that period of time, that is known through the Biblical scriptures, is the First Day of Creation. The discovery and subsequent studies of that new exoplanetary world is indeed to be equated with what is being described in the first book of Genesis: "And Elohim saw the light, that it was good."
As the planet Earth was deemed good, meaning it not only had all the elements necessary to bear new life, but was also favorable in a series of other, equally important aspects, the second phase begun. The Second Day of Creation is the sum of all events that happened subsequently during the Age of Sagittarius.

title: 金牛座时代
body:
The Age of Taurus lasts from –4'530 to –2'370 and follows the Age of Gemini which lasted up to –4'530.

Peace in Heaven

The exiled creators were pardoned and allowed to return to their original planet where they pleaded the case of their magnificent creation. As a result, everyone on the distant planet fixed their eyes on the Earth because it was inhabited by people they had themselves created.

The exiled creators were eventually forgiven and permitted to return to their original planet. They used this opportunity to advocate on behalf of their creation, the humans on Earth. This led to the distant planet focusing their attention on Earth as they realized it was home to the people they had created.
According to the text, the home planet's government ultimately won the conflict and decided to pardon the exiled creators. The text does not provide specific details on how this conflict was resolved, but it suggests that the creators were able to plead their case and convince the government of their planet to forgive them. After the pardon, the creators were allowed to return to their original planet, and everyone on the distant planet became interested in Earth because it was inhabited by beings that they themselves had created. It is possible that the resolution of the conflict involved a negotiation or agreement between the two factions, but the text does not provide further details.
Sodom and Gomorrah

But among the humans who had been dispersed on Earth, a few nursed the desire for vengeance, so they gathered in the towns of Sodom and Gomorrah and, having managed to salvage a few scientific secrets, they prepared an expedition aimed at punishing those who had tried to destroy them.

title: 水瓶座时代
body:
The Age of Aquarius lasts from 1950 CE to 4110 CE and followed the Age of Pisces which lasted up to 1950 CE. While you're reading this, chances are high that you're reading this during the time span of the Age of Aquarius. This World Age is now and is commonly referred to the New Age.

New Age
We transitioned into the Age of Aquarius which folloed the Age of Pisces. The transition from one World Age to the next can still be felt to this very day.

The time of the end of the world has arrived. Not the end of the world as in a catastrophe destroying the Earth, but the end of the world of the Church, which has completed its work. It performed this role more or less effectively. It was a task of vulgarization, making it possible for your creators to be recognized when they return. As you have noticed, the Christian church is dying. It is the end of this world because its mission has been fulfilled, albeit with quite a few mistakes because it tried for so long to deify the creators.

The transition into the Age of Aquarius, following the Age of Pisces, has brought about significant changes that are still felt today. This shift marks the end of the world for the Church, as its mission of spreading awareness about the creators has been completed. While the Church has faced challenges and made mistakes in trying to deify the creators, its decline signifies the fulfillment of its role in preparing for the return of these creators in the new age.
Vulgarization of the truth has been completed. The completion of the vulgarization of the Truth through the Bible and other authentic religious scriptures involves several aspects. The Bible has been translated into numerous languages and distributed across the globe, making its teachings accessible to a vast number of people, regardless of their linguistic and cultural backgrounds.
Throughout the past 2000 years since the Bible got canonized by the Church, religious leaders, scholars, and theologians have devoted their lives to inte

Awakening


The serpent... said unto the woman... of the fruit of the tree which is in the midst of the garden... ye shall not surely die, for Elohim doth know that in the day ye eat thereof, then your eyes shall be opened, and ye shall be like Elohim.
Genesis 3: 1-5.

Some scientists in this team felt a deep love for their little human beings, their “creatures”, and they wanted to give them a complete education in order to make them scientists like themselves. So they told these young people who were almost adults that they could pursue their scientific studies and in so doing they would become as knowledgeable as their creators.

In this passage, Yahweh refers to Genesis 3:1-5, where in the Biblical story the serpent tempts the woman to eat from the tree of the knowledge of good and evil. The passage then suggests that some scientists within the Elohim team felt a deep love for the humans they created and wanted to provide them with a complete education, including advanced scientific knowledge. These scientists, known collectively as the Serpent, encouraged the young humans, who were almost adults, to pursue their scientific studies, promising that by doing so, they would become as knowledgeable as their creators.
It appears that some scientists within the Elohim team developed a strong emotional bond with their human creations. This emotional connection may have led them to believe that the humans deserved to have access to the same knowledge as their creators, including advanced scientific understanding. As a result, these scientists challenged the restrictions imposed by their own civilization on the dissemination of scientific knowledge to humans.
By encouraging the young humans to pursue scientific studies, these scientists were essentially advoc

title: 天蝎座时代
body:
The Age of Scorpio lasts from –17'490 to –15'330 and follows the Age of Sagittarius which lasted up to –17'490.
In the last chapter, The Age of Sagittarius, we learned that the group of scientifically inclined spacefaring pioneers who managed to find an exoplanet that provided all elements necessary to produce artifical life, including water, studied the planet well enough to capitalize on its capacity to harbour life. The whole planet was covered in water, so they went on to build new outposts on the surface these oceans and kept studying and surveying the constitution of this new planet, especially its ocean and the bottom of it. Eventually, they realized they could terraform a dry land mass by piling up matter from the bottom of the ocean in one place. A single gigantic land mass emerged through the terraformation.
All of that happened during the Age of Sagittarius which lasted from –19'650 to –17'490, one of the twelve precessional World Ages. As we learned with the Age of Capricorn, which represents the First Day of Creation mentioned in the first book of Genesis, the Age of Sagittarius as the subsequent World Age is therefore representing the Second Day of Creation. The Bible describes the terraformation very eloquently as wollows: “Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together unto one place, and let the dry land appear.”
With the newly terraformed supercontinent, the Elohimian scientists could land on firm soil and build permanent structures; the third phase could begin. The Third Day of Creation is the sum of all events that happened subsequently during the Age of Scorpio.

Thus a natural balance would be established, and one species would not destroy another species in order to survive. This is what you now refer to as “ecology”, and that was achieved successfully. title: 双子座时代
body:
The Age of Gemini lasts from –6'690 to –4'530 and follows the Age of Cancer which lasted up to –6'690.
From the perspective of Genesis and its seven Days of Creation, the Age of Gemini would represent the Eight Day. The number eight is encoded in the amount of people entering Noah's Ark: Noah and his wife, his three sons and their wives, a total of 8 people.
The Age of Gemini is associated with the eighth day of creation and represents a time of new beginnings and fresh starts. This is reflected in the story of Noah and the Flood, which is said to have taken place during this age. According to the biblical account, God was disappointed with the state of humanity and decided to cleanse the Earth with a flood, sparing only Noah and his family. The Age of Gemini is also associated with the concept of duality, reflected in the symbol of the twins. This age is said to represent a time of increased communication, exchange, and cooperation between different cultures and peoples. It is a time when ideas and knowledge are shared and disseminated, leading to increased understanding and collaboration.
The Decision


And Elohim saw that the wickedness of man was great in the earth, and that every imagination of the thoughts of his heart was only evil continually. Genesis 6: 5.

The “evil” in question was the desire of human beings to become scientific and independent people equal to their creators. Being “good”, as far as those on the Elohim’s planet were concerned meant the new human beings would remain primitive, vegetating on the Earth. Their “evil” was their wish to progress, perhaps enabling them one day to catch up with their creators.

What happened on Earth was deemed too dangerous to the authorities on the Elohimian home planet. The passage suggests that Elohim saw the wickedness of humans on Earth, as they desired to become scientific and independent, equal to their creators. This desire for progress and advancement was seen as "evil" by the authorities on the Elohim

title: 序言
body:
这个时间线从大约在-22'000年前的某个时刻开始，就在进入摩羯座时代的门槛之前。在摩羯座时代之前，是上一个大年的水瓶座时代。在我们开始第一个岁差的大月——摩羯座的世界时代之前，值得我们探讨的是它的前因。为了说明发生了什么，我们可以从美国电影工业的经典之作《侏罗纪公园》中寻找灵感。
骄傲还是勇敢？
你看过史蒂文·斯皮尔伯格的经典电影系列《侏罗纪公园》吗？1 我们将以这部电影的前提和虚构背景作为我们的太空探陈者，行星地球改造者，和生命创造者的起点。第一部电影向我们介绍了富有且成功的企业家约翰·哈蒙德和他的一群杰出的科学家们，他们利用克隆和基因工程技术使恐龙复活。根据电影的说法，被困在未化石化的琥珀中的史前蚊子仍然含有部分完整的爬行动物血液，这是提取DNA的基础。为了完成DNA，科学家们通过一种推测性的过程用青蛙DNA填补了空白。有了这个，科学家们能够使长时间绝种的恐龙复活，这些恐龙在一个位于中美洲岛屿的主题公园中展出，吸引了来自世界各地的游客。
然而，当恐龙逃脱并造成混乱时，事情就出了错，但主角们设法在一切困难之下生存下来，并在电影结束时被一支救援队伍营救，这种模式在整个系列中一直在继续。这个电影系列以其对科学进步和人类骄傲的怀疑态度而闻名，这种态度的灵感来源于迈克尔·克莱顿1990年的同名小说。
下面是联系：根据Wheel of Heaven的假设，基于雅威对拉尔的启示，摩羯座时代的开始可能直接从《侏罗纪公园》的页面中取出：在这种情况下，一群有远见的科学家通过基因工程创造了一个新的，可能危险的物种，这最终导致了灾难性的结果并危及了他们的研究。
1
《侏罗纪公园》是由史蒂文·斯皮尔伯格执导的电影，但实际上它是基于迈克尔·克莱顿同名小说的。该书于1990年首次出版，讲述了一个由基因工程恐龙组成的主题公园的故事。书中探讨了基因工程的伦理和科学影响，以及与自然戏耍的危险。1993年，"侏罗纪公园"的电影改编版上映，大获成功。这部电影将小说的故事带给了更广大的观众，向很多人介绍了基因工程恐龙的概念。虽然侏罗纪公园的电影改编版与小说在某些方面有所不同，但它忠实于书的主题，探讨了许多相同的伦理和科学问题。欲了解更多信息，请点击此处：侏罗纪公园(小说) | 维基百科


    
    
    
        
    
    
        
        
        
    
    
    图. 1 - 基因实验室实验出错
    

从前的某一天
显然，侏罗纪公园是虚构的，最近没有研究机构因合成了一种已经灭绝或者新的生命物种而上新闻。我们即将讨论的事件应该放在一个完全不同的时代和时代中。
正如我们在上一章中指出的假设，我们承认瑞利斯主义的三部创作书籍作为正统2。这些书记录了一系列会议，这些会议发生在Yahweh（一个天上外星人委员会的首席代表，他们在过去的年代被误认为是神）和一个法国人之间。这个永恒者委员会最好被认为是一个我们通常记住的外星文明的管理机构，称为Elohim。上述法国人被赋予了拉-埃尔的名字，表示他作为地球大使的角色，他成立了一个新的宗教运动，称为瑞利斯主义3。新成立的运动的主要目标之一是保护，翻译和传播由雅威委托给所有愿意接受的人的消息。在这些消息中，雅威揭示了神的概念，修订了宗教的意义，并重新讲述了深入的《圣经》创世纪创造叙事。
在其中一个重新讲述中，雅威给出了一个重要的时间线索来确定他们在地球上的到来：

大约22000年前，你们的创造者决定在地球上开始他们的工作，从此以后发生的一切都是预见的，因为银河系的运动意味着这种知识。

这把我们放在了–21'810和–19'650之间的年份，这些年份组成了摩羯座时代。 Elohim据称来到地球并开始了他们在地球上的工作。虽然地球轴的进动摆动并不是这个星球独有的，但是它对可观察的夜空的影响以及它的持续时间是独一无二的。就像地球的一天或地球的一年是我们星球的独特特征一样，进动的世界时代同样是一个独特的特征。
因此，对一个没有生命的星球来说，一个外星文明的到来标志着一个智能实体能够观察到从地球看到的星空现象的开始。在十二个世界时代中，摩羯座时代开始的那一刻被选为起点，因为雅威声称在该时代之前，他们开始了他们的工作。
2
这些书是《外星人讲述的圣经》，《圣经的真实信息》和《yes, I am》。这三部作品共同构成了瑞利斯主义的"神圣书籍"。每一部作品都记录了拉尔与雅威之间的一次或多次遭遇，并解释了雅威的信息和启示。这些书籍提供了瑞利斯主义教义的基础，并解释了生命的起源，人类的目标，和我们在宇宙中的地位。

3
瑞利斯主义是一个以阿道夫·瑞利斯为首的新兴宗教运动，他自称是以他的新名字“拉尔”被雅威选中的地球大使。瑞利斯主义的教条包括对外星生命的信仰，特别是“埃

title: 摩羯座时代
body:
我们首先从摩羯座时代开始。摩羯座时代是大年周期中的第一个岁差月份。以25,920年为岁差年的标准周期，一个岁差月的持续时间是2,190年。在这段时间里，春分日出太阳与黄道上的摩羯座星座对齐。
正如地球围绕太阳公转定义的公历年被划分为12个月份，岁差年（也称为大年）被划分为12个岁差月份或大月份。这些大月份基于一个较长的周期，叫做岁差，它是地球自转轴方向稳定改变的现象。
简单地说，25,920年周期被划分为12个部分，每个部分在春分时都对应一个星座。这使得黄道宫成为一个适合记录跨越数千年的事件的方法，因为它们是由天文定义的，并且被普遍理解。这就是我们所说的实际的世界年代。
尽管选择摩羯座时代作为时间线的起点可能看起来是随意的，但是这个决定背后的原因在上一章序言 # 很久以前中已经详细阐述了。在上一章中，我们还了解到在摩羯座时代刚刚开始的时候，Elohim，一个外星文明，来到了地球。由于他们的一项基因实验出逃造成的悲剧性事件，导致了Elohim的生命丧失和他们在母星上那项研究的终止，Elohim开始寻找新的星际前沿。在追求行星间和星际探索的过程中，这些研究者最终选择了地球，一个系外行星，作为他们的基因研究前沿。

    
    
    
        
    
    
        
        
        
    
    
    图 1 - 从地球表面看到的公元前21810年的春分
    

真理的痕迹
三部拉尔教的基础作品之一，《说出真理的书📖》,以耶和华对圣经中各种段落进行深入的解释性解读开始。他将圣经介绍为一部包含被视为真实的事件记载的神圣文本。

现在我希望你们参考圣经，那里面有关于你们过去真相的线索。当然，这些线索已经被后来的抄写者稍微扭曲了，他们无法想象如此高级的技术，因此只能将所描述的解释为神秘和超自然的力量。

耶和华提供了对圣经各个段落的解读，揭示了关于人类过去真相，这种真相由于抄写者对高科技的理解不足而在时间的推移中被扭曲。

只有我将翻译的圣经部分才重要。其他部分只是诗意的胡言乱语，我对此一无所知。我相信你们能够欣赏到，由于法律规定，圣经必须一字不差地被重新复制，最深的含义始终穿越时代保持完整，即使文本已经充满了神秘和无用的句子。

耶和华解释说，只有他翻译的圣经部分才是重要的。
耶和华所指的精确复制法律可能是通过复制来保持圣经文本准确性的实践。在古代，打印术出现之前，抄写员负责复制如圣经之类的神圣文本。这些文本的复制通常需要极其精确并注意细节，即使最小的细节也不得更改。这是为了保护文本的完整性，并防止随着时间推移产生错误或变化。这种做法由宗教权威强制执行，以确保圣经的信息随着时间的推移保持不变。
耶和华提出，圣经的一些部分是“神秘和无用的句子”，这些句子是随着时间推移由连续的抄写者添加的，他们无法理解文本中描述的先进技术。可能由于古代抄写方法的局限性，比如复制错误、误译或对原文的误解，无意间引入了错误或添加。另一方面，某些句子和文本很可能出于政治或宗教原因，或者为了推广特定的信仰或议程，被添加到圣经中。然而，圣经的基本信息仍然完整无损。
因此，圣经被认为是一种有价值的情境化工具，因为它经过了几千年的精心抄写过程得以保存，并作为历史事件的证词。
创世纪
创世纪是希伯来圣经和基督教旧约的第一本书。它是犹太教的基础文本，即《律法》的一部分，包含了关于世界创造、第一个人类、早期人类历史的故事和记载。创世纪是圣经的开端，也是耶和华提出的第一次解释性阅读：

让我们从创世纪的第一章开始：

起初，Elohim1创造了天地。
创世纪 1:1。

Elohim在某些圣经中被无理由地翻译为God，而在希伯来语中，它意为“那些从天空来的”，而且这个词是复数。这意味着我们世界上的科学家们寻找了一颗适合他们进行项目的行星。[...]

耶和华专注于创世纪的第一章，并解释希伯来词Elohim，通常被翻译为上帝1，实际上意为"那些从天空来的"2，并明确地以复数形式写成3。这强烈暗示Elohim是指一个人民的复数4。更具体地说，那些从天空，从另一个星球来的人们，他们寻找适合进行科学项目的星球。

[...]他们“创造”了，或者实际上发现了地球，并意识到它含有所有创造人造生命所必需的元素，即使其大气与我们的并不完全相同。

这些发现地球的外星人认识到，地球包含了所有创造人造生命所必需的元素。这些元素可能包括生命的基本构造模块，也许是指构建氨基酸、核苷酸和其他有机化合物所必需的元素。这暗示这些科学家因为其独特的化学构成和支持生命的潜力而有意选择地球作为他们实验的地点。
地球拥有与这些科学家的母星不同的大气5是重要的，因为这暗示这些外星生物无法生物学地适应不同的环境，并不得不考虑创造适应地球大气条件的生命。地

title: 双鱼座时代（公元前 210 年—1950 年）
body:
The Age of Pisces lasted from –210 BC to 1950 CE and followed the Age of Aries which lasted up to –210. This World Age just ended very recently and the transition from the Age of Pisces to the new Age of Aquarius is still being felt.

The importance of the Biblical scriptures

Christ’s role was to spread the truth of the biblical scriptures throughout the world, so that they could serve as proof for all of humanity when the age of science would finally explain everything.

The significance of Biblical scriptures lies in their ability to convey essential truths about our existence and the world around us. Christ's mission was to disseminate these truths globally, ensuring their preservation for future generations. In the age of science, the knowledge found in the Bible can be better understood, providing evidence and insights for humanity.
If we consider the Age of Aquarius, which began in 1945 with the development of nuclear power and the advent of information systems, to be synonymous with the age of science, several implications arise. The Age of Aquarius, which will be the main focus in the next chapter bearing the same name, is often associated with a time of increased knowledge, technology, and human potential. In this context, the age of science represents a period where humanity gains a deeper understanding of the world, enabling us to reexamine and reinterpret ancient wisdom, such as the Biblical scriptures, through a modern lens. During the Age of Aquarius, scientific advancements have led to remarkable discoveries and innovations, which have significantly shaped our understanding of the universe and our place within it. The development of nuclear power, for instance, has not only revolutionized energy production but also provided us with a glimpse into the immense power contained within the fabric of matter itself. Similarly, the arrival of information systems has transformed our ability to communicate, share knowledge, and access vast amounts of informati

title: 起初
body:
创造的黎明
起初，在地球的故事开始之前，耶洛因文明已经达到了我们难以想象的科学成就高度。在他们遥远的母星上，他们已经掌握了生命本身的秘密。
巅峰时期的文明
耶洛因社会经过无数千年的发展，开发出能够操纵物质和能量、跨越太空广阔距离的技术，最重要的是，理解和控制生命机制的能力。
寻找新疆界
正是在这个时代，耶洛因将注意力转向了星空。他们的探索最终将把他们带到银河系一个安静角落的小蓝色星球——我们称之为地球的世界。
我们故事的开始
在随后的时代中展开的是地球创造的故事——不是作为神话或隐喻，而是作为有意识的科学发展的编年史来讲述。

title: 狮子座时代
body:
The Age of Leo lasts from –11'010 to –8'850 and follows the Age of Virgo which lasted up to –11'010.

    
    
    
        
    
    
        
        
        
    
    
    Fig. 1 - Vernal equinox in 11010 BC
    

Animal kingdom


Let the earth bring forth the living creature according to its kind: cattle and creeping thing and beast of the earth, each according to its kind.
Genesis 1: 24.

After marine organisms and birds, the scientists created land animals on a planet where the vegetation had by now become magnificent. There was plenty of food for the herbivores. These were the first land animals which were created. Later they created carnivores to balance the herbivorous population. Here too, the species had to maintain equilibrium. Those scientists who did all this came from the same planet as me. I am one of those people who created life on Earth.

In the quoted passage from the Raëlian book "The Book Which Tells the Truth," it is explained that scientists from another planet, including the speaker (Yahweh), created various forms of life on Earth. After developing marine organisms and birds, they focused on land animals. Initially, they created herbivores, supported by the already flourishing vegetation. To maintain ecological balance, carnivores were later introduced. The ultimate goal of these extraterrestrial scientists was to establish a harmonious ecological order on Earth.
Engineering a balanced ecological order is a complex process that involves understanding and manipulating various factors and components of an ecosystem. To create such an order, one must first study existing ecosystems, gaining insight into their structure, function, and the relationships between various living organisms and their environment. A key aspect of this process is identifying keystone species, which play a critical role in maintaining the structure and function of an ecosystem. title: 天秤座时代
body:
The Age of Libra lasts from –15'330 to –13'170 and follows the Age of Scorpio which lasted up to –15'330.
In the last chapter, The Age of Scorpio, we learned that the group of scientifically inclined spacefaring pioneers who managed to find an exoplanet that provided all elements necessary to produce artifical life, including water, studied the planet well enough to capitalize on its capacity to harbour life. As soon as they managed to terraform a new barren continental land mass out of the bottom of the oceans, they went on to synthetize plant life. This plant life was engineered from nothing else but chemical base elements. It didn't take them long to cover the new supercontinent with grass, saplings, shrubs and other greeneries. The engineers were joined by artists and formed various research groups that each focused on a different region of this supercontinent to diversify and sophisticate further the newly created flora.
All of that happened during the Age of Scorpio which lasted from –17'490 to –15'330, one of the twelve precessional World Ages. As we learned with the preceedings World Ages, which each represented one of the Days of Creation as mentioned in the first book of Genesis, the Age of Libra as the subsequent World Age is considered the Fourth Day of Creation.
With the research groups having split up and while exploring the prospective creative possibilities of having a whole planet to themselves, the Elohimian scientists had all the freedom in their hands to fully take advantage of their situation. Earth was a sandbox environment of engineering, research and artistic expression. It was time to settle further and better understand the environment they were in; the fourth phase could begin. The Fourth Day of Creation is the sum of all events that happened subsequently during the Age of Libra.
